articles.title: [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide versus everolimus for gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine tumours (COMPETE): a phase 3, multicentre, randomised, open-label, superiority trial
articles.authors: Walter T, Jann H, Ansquer C, Deshayes E, Garcia-Carbonero R, Teulé A, Baum RP, Verberne HJ, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Peptide receptor radionuclide and targeted therapy are both approved treatment options for patients with metastatic gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine tumours (GEP NETs), but clinical evidence for preferred sequencing is scarce. The COMPETE trial evaluated the efficacy and harms of peptide receptor radionuclide therapy ([177Lu]Lu-edotreotide) versus targeted molecular therapy (everolimus) in patients with advanced, progressive, somatostatin receptor-positive GEP NETs.
abstract.textZh: 肽受體放射性核素和靶向治療都是轉移性胃腸胰神經內分泌腫瘤（ GEP NET ）患者的批準治療選擇，但首選測序的臨牀證據很少。COMPETE試驗評估了肽受體放射性核素治療（ [177Lu] Lu-edotreotide ）與靶向分子治療（依維莫司）在晚期、進行性、生長抑素受體陽性GEP NET患者中的療效和危害。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This phase 3, open-label, superiority trial included patients aged 18 years or older with treatment-naive or previously treated unresectable or metastatic (or both) grade 1-2 GEP NETs. Patients were enrolled from 49 specialist neuroendocrine tumour treatment centres across 14 countries in Africa, Europe, North America, and Oceania and randomised (2:1) to intravenous [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide (7·5 ± 0·7 GBq every 3 months, maximum four cycles) or oral everolimus (10 mg/day) for up to 30 months. Random assignment was via a central, web-based randomisation system (block size of 6) and stratified by primary tumour origin and previous therapy. The primary endpoint was progression-free survival, assessed via blinded independent central review in all randomly assigned patients at 30 months. Harms were assessed in all enrolled patients who received at least one dose of a study drug. This study was registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT03049189) and is no longer recruiting.
abstract.textZh: 這項3期、開放標籤、優效性試驗包括18歲或以上的治療初治或既往治療過的不可切除或轉移性（或兩者兼有） 1-2級GEP NET患者。患者從非洲、歐洲、北美和大洋洲14個國家的49個專業神經內分泌腫瘤治療中心入組，並隨機（ 2: 1 ）靜脈注射[177Lu] Lu-edotreotide （每3個月7.5 ± 0.7 GBq ，最多4個週期）或口服依維莫司（ 10 mg/天）長達30個月。隨機分配通過中央網絡隨機分組系統（區塊大小為6 ）進行，並按原發腫瘤起源和既往治療分層。主要終點是無惡化生存期，在30個月時透過所有隨機分配的患者的盲獨立中央審查進行評估。在所有至少接受一劑研究藥物的入組患者中評估傷害。本研究已在ClinicalTrials.gov （ NCT03049189 ）註冊，不再招募。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between April 13, 2017, and June 20, 2022, 324 patients were enrolled and 309 patients (including 168 [54%] male patients and 141 [46%] female patients) were randomly assigned to treatment: 207 to the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 102 to the everolimus group. The median follow-up for progression-free survival was 27·5 months (IQR 19·6-30·4) for the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 21·2 months (8·9-29·4) for the everolimus group. Median progression-free survival was significantly longer with [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide versus everolimus (23·9 months [95% CI 18·7-30·0] vs 14·1 months [9·2-20·9]; stratified hazard ratio 0·67 [95% CI 0·48-0·95]; p=0·022). Treatment-related adverse events occurred in 178 (82%) of 217 patients in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 96 (97%) of 99 patients in the everolimus group. 40 (18%) patients in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 40 (40%) in the everolimus group had at least one treatment-related grade 3-4 adverse event. The most common treatment-related adverse events in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group were diarrhoea and nausea (both 79 [36%] patients) and asthenia (66 [33%] patients), whereas those in the everolimus group were diarrhoea (45 [45%] patients), asthenia (36 [36%] patients), and anaemia (27 [27%] patients). No treatment-related deaths occurred in either study group.
abstract.textZh: 2017年4月13日至2022年6月20日期間， 324名患者入組， 309名患者（包括168名[54%]男性患者和141名[46%]女性患者）被隨機分配到治療： 207名分配到[177Lu] Lu-edotreotide組， 102名分配到依維莫司組。 [177Lu] Lu-edotreotide組的無惡化生存期中位隨訪期為27 · 5個月(IQR 19 · 6-30 · 4) ，依維莫司組為21 · 2個月(8 · 9-29 · 4)。 [177Lu] Lu-edotreotide對比依維莫司的中位無惡化生存期顯著更長（ 23 · 9個月[95% CI 18 · 7-30 · 0]對比14 · 1個月[9 · 2-20 · 9] ；分層風險比0 · 67 [95% CI 0 · 48-0 · 95] ； p = 0 · 022 ）。 治療相關不良事件發生在[177Lu] Lu-edotreotide組的217名患者中的178名（ 82 ％ ）和依維莫司組的99名患者中的96名（ 97 ％ ）。[177Lu] Lu-edotreotide組的40名（ 18 ％ ）患者和依維莫司組的40名（ 40 ％ ）至少發生一次治療相關的3-4級不良事件。 [177Lu] Lu-edotreotide組中最常見的治療相關不良事件是腹瀉和噁心（均為79 [36%]名患者）和乏力（ 66 [33%]名患者） ，而依維莫司組中最常見的治療相關不良事件是腹瀉（ 45 [45%]名患者）、乏力（ 36 [36%]名患者）和貧血（ 27 [27%]名患者）。 兩個研究組均未發生治療相關死亡。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide led to statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvements in progression-free survival. Efficacy and harms results support the use of [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide in early lines of therapy in patients with advanced, progressive GEP NETs.
abstract.textZh: [177Lu] Lu-edotreotide導致無惡化生存期的統計顯著和臨牀意義的改善。療效和危害結果支持在晚期進行性GEP NET患者的早期治療中使用[177Lu] Lu-edotreotide。

articles.title: Safety and efficacy of mRNA vaccines: a mechanistic and public health perspective
articles.authors: Blakney AK, Top KA, Cowling BJ, Larson HJ, Shattock RJ, Sadarangani M

abstract.text: mRNA vaccines represent a transformative advance in vaccinology, combining rapid development timelines, scalable manufacturing, and strong immunogenicity with a favourable safety profile. Global deployment of mRNA vaccines during the COVID-19 pandemic provided an unprecedented real-world evaluation of this platform, with billions of doses administered across diverse populations. In this Review, we critically examine the safety and efficacy of mRNA vaccines from mechanistic, preclinical, clinical, and public health perspectives. We outline the biological basis of mRNA vaccines, including their transient cytoplasmic expression, lack of genomic integration, and rapid clearance, distinguishing them clearly from other gene therapies. We synthesise evidence on vaccine components, manufacturing quality controls, and regulatory standards that underpin safety, alongside data from randomised trials, post-authorisation surveillance, and active pharmacovigilance systems. We also review real-world effectiveness across age groups, pregnancy, and populations that are immunocompromised, along with the effects on transmission. Last, we address public perception and vaccine confidence, and discuss implications for next-generation mRNA vaccines, including strategies to reduce reactogenicity, improve breadth and durability of immunity, enhance global access, and support sustainable public trust. Together, the accumulated evidence affirms mRNA vaccines as a safe, effective, and adaptable platform with enduring relevance for future infectious disease prevention and public health preparedness, and for the treatment of cancer and autoimmunity.
abstract.textZh: mRNA疫苗代表了疫苗學的變革性進步，將快速開發時間表、可擴展製造和強大的免疫原性與良好的安全性結合在一起。 在COVID-19大流行期間， mRNA疫苗的全球部署為該平臺提供了前所未有的現實世界評估，在不同人羣中施用數十億劑量。 在本綜述中，我們從機械、臨牀前、臨牀和公共衛生的角度批判性地檢查mRNA疫苗的安全性和有效性。 我們概述了mRNA疫苗的生物學基礎，包括它們的瞬時細胞質表達、缺乏基因組整合和快速清除，將它們與其他基因治療清楚地區分開來。 我們綜合有關疫苗成分、製造質量控制和監管標準的證據，以及隨機試驗、授權後監測和積極藥物警戒系統的數據。 我們還審查了免疫功能低下的年齡組、懷孕和人羣的真實有效性，以及對傳播的影響。 最後，我們討論公眾認知和疫苗信心，並討論對下一代mRNA疫苗的影響，包括降低反應原性、提高免疫廣度和持久性、增強全球可及性以及支持可持續公眾信任的策略。 累積的證據共同肯定了mRNA疫苗是一種安全，有效和適應性強的

articles.titleZh: MRNA疫苗的安全性和有效性：機械和公共衛生觀點

articles.title: Efficacy and safety of tirofiban after successful endovascular reperfusion in acute ischaemic stroke (ATTRACTION) in China: a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial
articles.authors: Huang H, Xu S, Qin T, Wang M, Li G, Liu C, Deng G, Wang Y, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Successful reperfusion after endovascular thrombectomy does not consistently result in functional independence in acute ischaemic stroke. We aimed to assess the efficacy and safety of tirofiban, a glycoprotein IIb/IIIa receptor antagonist, given to patients with acute ischaemic stroke who had had a successful endovascular reperfusion.
abstract.textZh: 血管內血栓切除後再灌注的成功並不一定會導致急性缺血性中風的功能獨立。我們旨在評估替羅非班（一種糖蛋白IIb/IIIa受體拮抗劑）給予成功進行血管內再灌注的急性缺血性中風患者的療效和安全性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial at 82 hospitals in China included patients with acute ischaemic stroke due to anterior-circulation large-vessel occlusion who had had a successful reperfusion after thrombectomy. Eligible patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to receive either tirofiban (intra-arterial bolus 5 μg/kg followed by intravenous infusion 0·1 μg/kg per min for 24 h) or placebo (administered with the same volume and according to the same bolus and infusion procedures as tirofiban), using computer-generated randomisation with fixed blocks stratified by study site. Patients, treating clinicians, investigators, and outcome assessors were masked to group assignments. The primary efficacy outcome was functional independence at 90 days (with a modified Rankin Scale score of 0-2), assessed in all randomly assigned participants (intention-to-treat population). Safety outcomes were symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage within 48 h, any evidence of intracranial haemorrhage on imaging within 48 h, and death within 90 days, and they were assessed in patients having received the study treatment with at least one safety evaluation. The Adjunct Tirofiban Treatment after Successful Endovascular Thrombectomy Recanalisation in Acute Anterior Circulation Ischaemic Stroke (ATTRACTION) trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT06265051 and is now completed.
abstract.textZh: 這項在中國82家醫院進行的多中心、雙盲、隨機對照試驗包括血栓切除後成功再灌注的因前循環大血管閉塞而導致急性缺血性中風的患者。 符合資格的患者被隨機分配（ 1: 1 ）接受替羅非班（動脈內推注5 μg/kg ，然後靜脈輸注0.1 μg/kg每分鐘，持續24小時）或安慰劑（按照與替羅非班相同的推注和輸注程序以相同的體積給藥） ，使用電腦生成的隨機化分配，固定塊按研究中心分層。 患者、治療臨牀醫生、研究者和結果評估人員被掩蓋在小組分配中。 主要療效結果是在90天時的功能獨立性（修改的Rankin量表評分為0-2 ） ，在所有隨機分配的參與者（意向性治療人羣）中進行評估。 安全性結果為48小時內出現症狀性顱內出血、48小時內成像出現任何顱內出血的證據，以及90天內死亡，並在接受研究治療的患者中進行評估，並進行至少一次安全性評估。 急性前循環缺血性卒中（ ATTRACTION ）血管內血栓切除成功後的輔助替羅非班治療已在ClinicalTrials.gov ， NCT06265051註冊，現已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Of 1686 patients assessed, 1380 were randomly assigned to either the tirofiban group (689 patients) or the placebo group (691 patients) between April 9, 2024, and Sept 29, 2025. Median age was 71 years (IQR 62-77), 591 (43%) patients were female and 789 (57%) were male, and 1367 (99%) were of Han Chinese ethnicity. No patients were lost to follow-up at 90 days. Functional independence at 90 days was recorded in 340 (49%) of 689 patients in the tirofiban group and 299 (43%) of 691 patients in the placebo group (unadjusted absolute risk difference 6·1 percentage points, 95% CI 0·8-11·3, p=0·023; adjusted risk ratio 1·15, 95% CI 1·03-1·27, p=0·0092). There was no significant difference between study groups in the proportion of patients with symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage within 48 h (82 [12%] of 687 patients in the tirofiban group vs 65 [9%] of 691 patients in the placebo group), the proportion with any intracranial haemorrhage within 48 h (235 [34%] patients vs 219 [32%] patients), and 90-day mortality (126 [18%] patients vs 131 [19%] patients).
abstract.textZh: 在評估的1686名患者中， 1380名在2024年4月9日至2025年9月29日期間被隨機分配到替羅非班組（ 689名患者）或安慰劑組（ 691名患者）。 中位年齡為71歲（ IQR 62-77 ） ， 591名（ 43 ％ ）患者為女性， 789名（ 57 ％ ）為男性， 1367名（ 99 ％ ）為漢族。 在90天時，沒有患者失去追蹤。 在替羅非班組的689名患者中的340名（ 49% ）和安慰劑組的691名患者中的299名（ 43% ）中記錄了90天的功能獨立性（未調整絕對風險差異6 · 1個百分點， 95% CI 0 · 8-11 · 3 ， p = 0 · 023 ；調整風險比1 · 15 ， 95% CI 1 · 03-1 · 27 ， p = 0 · 0092 ）。 研究組之間在48小時內出現症狀性顱內出血的患者比例（替羅非班組687名患者中的82名[12%]對比安慰劑組691名患者中的65名[9%] ）、48小時內出現任何顱內出血的患者比例（ 235名[34%]患者對比219名[32%]患者）和90天死亡率（ 126名[18%]患者對比131名[19%]患者）方面沒有顯著差異。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: In patients with acute ischaemic stroke due to anterior-circulation large-vessel occlusion achieving successful reperfusion, adjunctive tirofiban increased the likelihood of functional independence compared with placebo. Although symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage occurred numerically more often with tirofiban, the between-group difference was not significant, and this finding warrants caution when weighing potential benefit against bleeding risk.
abstract.textZh: 在因前循環大血管阻塞導致再灌注成功的急性缺血性中風患者中，與安慰劑相比，輔助替羅非班增加了功能獨立的可能性。儘管替羅非班在數值上更常發生症狀性顱內出血，但組間差異並不顯著，這一發現在權衡潛在的益處與出血風險時值得謹慎。

articles.title: Safety, pharmacokinetics, and exploratory efficacy of the oral ghrelin receptor agonist AC01 in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (GOAL-HF1): a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 1b/2a study
articles.authors: Lund LH, Barandiarán Aizpurua A, Bollano E, Braun O, Brouwer JLP, Buikema JW, Cannata A, Gardner RS, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: The central problem in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) is reduced contractility. Existing inotropes are associated with adverse effects. In this exploratory study, we aimed to assess the safety and tolerability of AC01, a novel oral calcium-sensitising inotrope and ghrelin receptor agonist, in patients with HFrEF.
abstract.textZh: 射血分數降低（ HFrEF ）的心力衰竭的核心問題是收縮力降低。現有的肌力與不良反應有關。在這項探索性研究中，我們旨在評估AC01的安全性和耐受性， AC01是一種新型口服鈣敏感性肌力藥和ghrelin受體激動劑，用於HFrEF患者。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 1b/2a, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, adults aged 18-80 years with heart failure for at least 6 months and an ejection fraction of 40% or lower were enrolled at 14 sites in the Netherlands, the UK, Sweden, and Italy. All patients had a transvenous implantable cardioverter defibrillator for primary prevention, with back-up pacing to protect against excessive bradycardia. Other eligibility criteria included sinus rhythm or permanent, persistent, or paroxysmal atrial fibrillation or flutter (only allowed in phase 2a), with a mean resting heart rate of 55-90 beats per min. Randomisation used permuted blocks, with block sizes of four for phase 1b and three for phase 2a. In phase 1b, patients were enrolled in four sequential dose cohorts and randomly assigned 3:1 to ascending doses of AC01 (0·1 mg, 0·3 mg, 1·0 mg, or 3·0 mg) or placebo twice daily for 7 days. In phase 2a, patients were randomly assigned 1:1:1 to parallel groups receiving 1·0 mg AC01, 3·0 mg AC01 (1·0 mg AC01 on days 1 and 2 and 3·0 mg thereafter), or placebo orally twice daily for 28 days. Patients, study personnel, outcomes assessors, those analysing the data, and the sponsor were masked to treatment assignment. The primary outcome was safety and tolerability. Safety was monitored by physical examination, vital signs, safety laboratory assessments, and 12-lead electrocardiograms (ECGs) periodically during the treatment period and until the end-of-study visit (day 12 in phase 1b and day 42 in phase 2a), and cardiac rhythm was continuously monitored remotely using a patch device until day 9 in phase 1b and until day 4 in phase 2a. Adverse or unexpected events, signs, or symptoms were recorded. This study is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT05642507, and has been completed.
abstract.textZh: 在這項1b/2a期隨機、雙盲、安慰劑對照研究中，在荷蘭、英國、瑞典和義大利的14個研究中心招募了年齡在18-80歲且心力衰竭至少6個月且射血分數≥ 40%的成年人。 所有患者均使用經靜脈植入式心臟除顫器進行一級預防，並使用備用心律調節來預防過度心動過緩。 其他合格標準包括竇性心律或永久性、持續性或突發性心房顫動或撲動（僅在2a期允許） ，平均靜息心率為每分鐘55-90次。 隨機分組使用置換區塊， 1b期為4個區塊大小， 2a期為3個區塊大小。 在1b期，患者入組四個順序劑量隊列，並隨機以3: 1的比例將AC01 （ 0 · 1mg、0 · 3mg、1 · 0mg或3 · 0mg ）或安慰劑的劑量增加，每日兩次，持續7天。 在第2a期中，患者被隨機分配1: 1: 1至接受1 · 0 mg AC01、3 · 0 mg AC01 （第1天和第2天為1 · 0 mg AC01 ，其後為3 · 0 mg ）或安慰劑的平行組，每日兩次，持續28天。 患者、研究人員、結果評估人員、分析資料的人員和申辦者在治療指派時被遮蔽。 主要結果是安全性和耐受性。 在治療期間和研究結束回診（第12天）前，定期通過體格檢查、生命徵象、安全實驗室評估和12導程心電圖（ ECG ）來監測安全性。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between Feb 23, 2023, and Aug 28, 2025, 58 patients (53 [91%] male and five [9%] female patients with a median age of 66·0 years [IQR 60·3-72·0]) were randomly assigned: 32 in phase 1b and 26 in phase 2a. In phase 1b, four cohorts of eight patients were enrolled; in each cohort, six patients were allocated to AC01 and two to placebo, with AC01 dose cohorts of 0·1 mg, 0·3 mg, 1·0 mg, and 3·0 mg. In phase 2a, nine patients were allocated to 1·0 mg AC01, eight to 3·0 mg AC01, and nine to placebo. There were 12 AC01-related adverse events in phase 1b and 18 in phase 2a. There were no AC01-related serious adverse events; one treatment-related serious adverse event of increased high-sensitivity cardiac troponin I concentration occurred in a patient receiving placebo in phase 1b. Mild or moderate treatment-emergent adverse events were reported in 33 (80%) of 41 patients receiving AC01 and 12 (71%) of 17 patients receiving placebo. The most common treatment-emergent adverse events were hypotension, non-sustained ventricular tachycardia, dyspnoea, hyperglycaemia, dizziness or vertigo, and headache. ECG data showed no apparent signs of tachycardia, new-onset tachyarrhythmias, myocardial ischaemia, or morphological or conduction abnormalities. No case of symptomatic hypotension was reported, and there were no apparent effects of AC01 on high-sensitivity cardiac troponin I or NT-proBNP. There were no deaths during the study.
abstract.textZh: 在2023年2月23日至2025年8月28日期間， 58名患者（ 53名[91%]男性和5名[9%]女性患者，中位年齡為66 · 0歲[IQR 60 · 3-72 · 0] ）被隨機分配： 1b期32名， 2a期26名。 在1b期，招募了四組八名患者；在每組中，六名患者被分配到AC01 ，兩名患者被分配到安慰劑， AC01劑量組為0 · 1mg、0 · 3mg、1 · 0mg和3 · 0mg。 在2a期， 9名患者被分配到1 · 0 mg AC01 ， 8至3 · 0 mg AC01 ， 9名患者被分配到安慰劑。 1b期有12例AC01相關不良事件， 2a期有18例。 沒有AC01相關的嚴重不良事件； 1b期接受安慰劑的患者發生了一次治療相關的嚴重不良事件，即高敏感性心肌肌鈣蛋白I濃度增加。 接受AC01的41名患者中有33名（ 80% ）報告了輕度或中度治療中出現的不良事件，接受安慰劑的17名患者中有12名（ 71% ）報告了輕度或中度治療中出現的不良事件。 最常見的治療中出現的不良事件是低血壓、非持續性室性心動過速、呼吸困難、高血糖、頭暈或眩暈以及頭痛。 心電圖數據顯示沒有明顯的心跳過速、新發作的心跳過速、心肌缺血或形態或傳導異常的跡象。 無症狀性低血壓病例， AC01對高敏心肌肌鈣蛋白I或NT-proBNP無明顯影響。 研究期間沒有人死亡。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: In patients with HFrEF, AC01 over 28 days appeared safe and well tolerated, and no major harms were identified in this early-phase study. These findings support further investigations of AC01 in larger studies.
abstract.textZh: 在HFrEF患者中，超過28天的AC01似乎安全且耐受性良好，在這項早期研究中未發現重大危害。這些發現支持在大型研究中進一步研究AC01。

articles.title: Mezigdomide, carfilzomib, and dexamethasone versus carfilzomib and dexamethasone in patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma (SUCCESSOR-2): a phase 3, open-label, randomised controlled trial
articles.authors: Dimopoulos MA, Schjesvold F, Fu C, Hartley-Brown MA, Gomez C, Reece D, Mikala G, Alkharabsheh O, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: A growing number of patients with multiple myeloma are anti-CD38 antibody-exposed and lenalidomide-exposed at first relapse, subsequently limiting their treatment options. Mezigdomide, a potent cereblon E3 ligase modulator, induces maximal, rapid Ikaros and Aiolos degradation, resulting in enhanced myeloma cell cytotoxicity and immune stimulation versus immunomodulatory drugs. The SUCCESSOR-2 trial evaluates the efficacy and safety of mezigdomide in combination with carfilzomib and dexamethasone versus carfilzomib plus dexamethasone.
abstract.textZh: 越來越多的多發性骨髓瘤患者在首次復發時暴露於抗CD38抗體和來那度胺，隨後限制了他們的治療選擇。Mezigdomide是一種強效的Cereblon E3連接酶調節劑，可誘導最大、快速的Ikaros和Aiolos降解，與免疫調節藥物相比，可增強骨髓瘤細胞毒性和免疫刺激。SUCCESSOR-2試驗評估mezigdomide合併carfilzomib和地塞米鬆與carfilzomib合併dexamethasone的療效和安全性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This phase 3, open-label, randomised controlled trial was conducted at 160 hospital-based sites in 26 countries using a two-stage, inferentially seamless design. Eligible adult patients had measurable multiple myeloma, had received at least one previous regimen (including anti-CD38 antibodies and lenalidomide) on which they had achieved minimal response or better, and documented disease progression during or after their most recent treatment. Interactive response technology was used to randomly assign patients, stratified by age (≤70 years or >70 years), number of previous lines of therapy (≤2 or >2), and International Staging System stage (I, II, or III). Patients received oral mezigdomide (days 1-21 of each 28-day cycle) plus intravenous carfilzomib (56 mg/m2 weekly) and oral or intravenous dexamethasone (40 mg weekly) or carfilzomib (56 mg/m2 twice weekly or 70 mg/m2 weekly) and dexamethasone (20 mg twice weekly or 40 mg weekly). In stage 1, mezigdomide dosing across three levels was optimised. In stage 2, patients were randomly assigned to the selected mezigdomide dose (1·0 mg) plus carfilzomib and dexamethasone or carfilzomib-dexamethasone alone. The primary endpoint was progression-free survival (PFS) evaluated in patients who received 1·0 mg mezigdomide plus carfilzomib and dexamethasone or carfilzomib-dexamethasone alone across both study stages. No imputation was planned for missing efficacy endpoint values or missing safety evaluations. The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05552976) and EUClinicalTrials.eu (EUCT number 2022-500861-29-00). The trial is active but not recruiting.
abstract.textZh: 這項3期、開放標籤、隨機對照試驗在26個國家的160家醫院進行，採用兩階段、推斷無縫設計。 符合資格的成人患者患有可測量的多發性骨髓瘤，曾接受過至少一種既往方案（包括抗CD38抗體和來那度胺） ，並在最近治療期間或之後記錄了疾病進展。 使用互動反應技術隨機分配患者，按年齡（ ≤ 70歲或> 70歲）、既往治療線數（ ≤ 2或> 2 ）和國際分期系統分期（ I、II或III ）分層。 患者接受口服mezigdomide （每個28天週期的第1-21天）加上靜脈注射carfilzomib （每週56 mg/m2 ）和口服或靜脈注射地塞米鬆（每週40 mg ）或carfilzomib （每週兩次56 mg/m2或每週70 mg/m2 ）和地塞米鬆（每週兩次20 mg或每週40 mg ）。 在第1階段，優化了三個級別的mezigdomide劑量。 在第2階段，患者被隨機分配到所選的mezigdomide劑量（ 1.0 mg ）加上carfilzomib和地塞米鬆或carfilzomib-dexamethasone單藥。 主要終點是在兩個研究階段接受1.0 mg mezigdomide加carfilzomib和地塞米鬆或carfilzomib-dexamethasone單藥治療的患者中評估的無惡化存活期（ PFS ）。 沒有計劃針對缺少有效性終點值或缺少安全性評估進行估算。試驗為

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between Feb 3, 2023, and Nov 28, 2025, 762 patients were assessed for eligibility, of which 606 patients were enrolled and 479 were included in the analyses (288 patients in the mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone group and 191 patients in the carfilzomib-dexamethasone group). 252 (53%) patients were male, 411 (86%) were anti-CD38 antibody-refractory, and 363 (76%) were lenalidomide-refractory, with a median of two previous lines of therapy (IQR 2-4). At 10·6 months median follow-up, mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone significantly improved PFS compared with carfilzomib-dexamethasone (median 18·0 months vs 8·3 months; hazard ratio 0·48 [95% CI 0·36-0·63]; p<0·0001). Grade 3 or 4 adverse events were observed in 241 (84%) patients receiving mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone versus 105 (56%) patients receiving carfilzomib-dexamethasone, including neutropenia (176 [61%] vs 17 [9%]) and infections (98 [34%] vs 29 [16%]). Eight (3%; 95% CI 1-5) and one (1%; 95% CI 0-3) treatment-related grade 5 adverse events were reported with mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone and with carfilzomib-dexamethasone, respectively (rate difference 2%; 95% CI -1 to 5). Deaths occurred in 62 (22%) patients in the mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone group and 51 (27%) patients in the carfilzomib-dexamethasone group, mainly due to disease progression.
abstract.textZh: 在2023年2月3日至2025年11月28日期間，評估了762名患者的資格，其中606名患者入組， 479名患者被納入分析（ mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone組288名患者和carfilzomib-dexamethasone組191名患者）。252名（ 53 ％ ）患者為男性， 411名（ 86 ％ ）為抗CD38抗體難治性， 363名（ 76 ％ ）為來那度胺難治性，中位數為先前兩線治療（ IQR 2-4 ）。 在中位隨訪10 · 6個月時， mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone與carfilzomib-dexamethasone相比顯著改善PFS （中位18 · 0個月對比8 · 3個月；風險比0 · 48 [95% CI 0 · 36-0 · 63] ； p < 0 · 0001 ）。 在241名(84%)接受mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone的患者與105名(56%)接受carfilzomib-dexamethasone的患者中觀察到3或4級不良事件，包括嗜中性白血球缺乏症(176 [61%] vs 17 [9%])和感染(98 [34%] vs 29 [16%])。 使用mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone和carfilzomib-dexamethasone分別報告了8例（ 3% ； 95% CI 1-5 ）和1例（ 1% ； 95% CI 0-3 ）治療相關的5級不良事件（差異率為2% ； 95% CI -1至5 ）。 死亡發生在mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone組的62 (22%)名患者和carfilzomib-dexamethasone組的51 (27%)名患者，主要是由於疾病進展。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone provided a significant PFS benefit compared with carfilzomib-dexamethasone alone, with higher rates of grade 3 or 4 adverse events, including infections, which were mostly manageable with standard clinical practice and supportive care. These findings support mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone as a clinically meaningful treatment option as early as first relapse in predominantly triple-class-exposed, anti-CD38 antibody-refractory and lenalidomide-refractory patients, a growing population with substantial unmet need.
abstract.textZh: 與單獨使用carfilzomib-dexamethasone相比， Mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone提供了顯著的PFS益處， 3或4級不良事件的發生率更高，包括感染，這些不良事件大多可以通過標準臨牀實踐和支持性護理來控制。這些發現支持mezigdomide-carfilzomib-dexamethasone作為一種臨牀上有意義的治療選擇，早在主要暴露於三重類別、抗CD38抗體難治性和來那度胺難治性患者的首次復發時，這種人羣在不斷增長，且需求大量未得到滿足。

articles.title: The role of community-based blood pressure screening in improving hypertension care
articles.authors: Poulter NR, Beaney T, Kerr GK, Kiru G, Schlaich M, Schutte AE, Stergiou GS

abstract.text: In their recent Viewpoint, Frieden and colleagues argue that mass blood pressure screening diverts resources from improving hypertension care. We present a counterargument that community-based blood pressure screening can complement health-care services by increasing hypertension detection, particularly in populations with limited access to health care. Opportunistic community-based screening can be delivered at relatively low cost and reach individuals who might not otherwise engage with health-care systems. In settings where access to health-care facilities is constrained, such approaches provide an additional route to identifying raised blood pressure and initiating further assessment. When implemented using validated blood pressure devices and standardised protocols, community-based screening can support accurate measurement, although confirmatory diagnosis and long-term management require linkage to health-care facilities. In addition to case detection, screening initiatives contribute to improved awareness of hypertension through community engagement and public health messaging. Increasing detection of raised blood pressure will be essential to improving population-level control. Community-based screening, alongside strengthened primary care, could form part of a broader strategy to address the global burden of hypertension.
abstract.textZh: 在他們最近的《觀點》中， Frieden及其同事認為，大規模血壓篩查分散了改善高血壓護理的資源。 我們提出了一個反駁論點，即基於社區的血壓篩查可以通過增加高血壓檢測來補充醫療保健服務，特別是在醫療保健機會有限的人羣中。 機會主義基於社區的篩查可以以相對較低的成本提供，並接觸到可能無法參與醫療保健系統的個人。 在使用醫療設施受到限制的情況下，這種方法為識別血壓升高和啟動進一步評估提供了額外的途徑。 當使用經過驗證的血壓設備和標準化方案實施時，以社區為基礎的篩查可以支持準確的測量，儘管確診和長期管理需要與醫療保健機構聯繫。 除了病例檢測之外，篩查計劃還有助於通過社區參與和公共衛生信息提高對高血壓的認識。 增加血壓升高的檢測對於改善人羣水平控制至關重要。 基於社區的篩查，以及加強的初級保健，可以成為解決全球高血壓負擔的更廣泛戰略的一部分。

articles.titleZh: 基於社區的血壓篩查在改善高血壓護理中的作用

articles.title: Empirical treatment with valganciclovir in infants living with HIV and hospitalised with severe pneumonia in Africa: a multicentre, open-label, factorial, randomised, controlled, superiority trial
articles.authors: Moraleda C, Tagarro A, Domínguez-Rodríguez S, Musiime V, Mujuru H, Chabala C, Mvalo T, Iroh-Tam PY, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Mortality among infants with severe HIV-associated pneumonia remains high. This trial (EMPIRICAL) tested whether empirical valganciclovir treatment for cytomegalovirus improves survival in infants in Africa.
abstract.textZh: 患有嚴重HIV相關肺炎的嬰兒的死亡率仍然很高。這項實驗性試驗測試了巨細胞病毒的纈更昔洛韋實驗性治療是否能提高非洲嬰兒的存活率。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This multicentre, open-label, group-sequential designed, 2 × 2 factorial, randomised, controlled, superiority trial was conducted in 19 hospitals across Côte d'Ivoire, Malawi, Mozambique, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Infants aged 28-365 days admitted with severe HIV-associated pneumonia were centrally and individually randomly assigned (1:1:1:1) using a secure web-based system stratified by site and severity to receive standard of care (SOC) comprising treatment for bacterial (WHO-recommended antibiotics) and Pneumocystis jirovecii (cotrimoxazole and steroids) pneumonia, SOC plus 15 days of oral valganciclovir (16 mg/kg per 12 h), or SOC plus 6 months of tuberculosis treatment (isoniazid, rifampicin, pyrazinamide, and ethambutol for 2 months, plus isoniazid and rifampicin for 4 subsequent months), or both interventions combined. The primary endpoint was all-cause mortality, assessed at day 15 and over 1-year follow-up in the intention-to-treat population. In this Article, we report results for the valganciclovir comparison groups. The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT03915366 and is complete.
abstract.textZh: 這項多中心、開放標籤、羣組順序設計、2 × 2階乘、隨機、對照、優越性試驗在科特迪瓦、馬拉維、莫桑比克、烏幹達、尚比亞和辛巴威的19家醫院進行。 28-365天入院患有嚴重HIV相關肺炎的嬰兒，使用安全的基於網絡的系統，按部位和嚴重程度分層，集中和個別隨機分配（ 1: 1: 1: 1 ）接受標準護理（ SOC ） ，包括治療細菌（ WHO推薦的抗生素）和肺孢子桿菌（復方噁唑和類固醇）肺炎， SOC加上15天的口服纈更昔洛韋（每12小時16毫克/公斤） ，或SOC加上6個月的結核病治療（ 2個月的異嗪、利福平、吡嗪酰胺和乙胺丁醇，加上4個月的異嗪和利福平） ，或兩者合併幹預治療。 主要終點為全因死亡率，在第15天評估，並在意向治療族羣中進行超過1年的隨訪。 在本文中，我們報告了纈更昔洛韋對照組的結果。 試驗已在ClinicalTrials.gov ， NCT03915366註冊並已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: From March 15, 2020, to Jan 31, 2024, 563 participants were enrolled; 558 were included in the analyses, with 276 allocated to valganciclovir groups (140 valganciclovir; 136 valganciclovir plus tuberculosis treatment) and 282 to groups without valganciclovir (142 SOC; 140 tuberculosis treatment). The median patient age was 4·4 months (IQR 3·2-7·4), and 274 (49%) were female. There was no evidence of interaction between valganciclovir and tuberculosis treatment (adjusted hazard ratio 1·19 [95% CI 0·73-1·95], heterogeneity p=0·48). At day 15, 64 (23%) of 276 participants in the valganciclovir group and 76 (27%) of 282 in groups without valganciclovir died (rate ratio 0·81 [95% CI 0·61-1·08], p=0·15). 24 (9%) of 276 participants and 13 (5%) of 282, respectively, were lost to follow-up. After 12 months, 119 (43%) of 276 participants in the valganciclovir groups and 134 (48%) of 282 in the groups without valganciclovir died (0·88 [95% CI 0·74-1·05] p=0·15). In a time-varying effects model, at day 15, the adjusted hazard ratio of death was 0·60 (95% CI 0·41-0·87, p=0·0063), and their hazard of death over 1 year was 0·79 (0·62-1·01; p=0·068), or 0·76 (0·58-1·00; p=0·0500) when excluding deaths within 48 h of treatment. Severe adverse events during follow-up were not more common in the valganciclovir treatment groups (odds ratio 0·64 [95% CI 0·35-1·16]).
abstract.textZh: 從2020年3月15日至2024年1月31日，共招募563名參與者； 558名參與分析，其中276名分配到纈更昔洛韋組（ 140名纈更昔洛韋； 136名纈更昔洛韋加結核治療） ， 282名分配到未使用纈更昔洛韋組（ 142名SOC ； 140名結核治療）。 中位患者年齡為4 · 4個月（ IQR 3 · 2-7 · 4 ） ， 274名（ 49% ）為女性。 沒有纈更昔洛韋與結核病治療之間相互作用的證據（調整風險比1 · 19 [95% CI 0 · 73-1 · 95] ，異質性p = 0 · 48 ）。 在第15天，纈更昔洛韋組276名參與者中的64名（ 23% ）和無纈更昔洛韋組282名參與者中的76名（ 27% ）死亡（比率比0.81 [95% CI 0.61-1.08] ， p = 0.15 ）。276名參與者中的24名（ 9% ）和282名參與者中的13名（ 5% ）分別失蹤。 12個月後，纈更昔洛韋組276名參與者中的119名（ 43% ）和無纈更昔洛韋組282名參與者中的134名（ 48% ）死亡（ 0 · 88 [95% CI 0 · 74-1 · 05] p = 0 · 15 ）。 在時變效應模型中，在第15天，調整後的死亡風險比為0 · 60 （ 95 ％ CI 0 · 41-0 · 87 ， p = 0 · 0063 ） ，其1年內的死亡風險為0 · 79 （ 0 · 62-1 · 01 ； p = 0 · 068 ） ，或在排除治療48小時內的死亡時為0 · 76 （ 0 · 58-1 · 00 ； p = 0 · 0500 ）。 追蹤期間的重度不良事件在纈更昔洛韋治療組中並不常見(比值比0 · 64 [95% CI 0 · 35-1 · 16])。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Empirical valganciclovir treatment appeared to be associated with a lower hazard of death in infants with severe HIV-associated pneumonia than SOC alone or SOC plus empirical tuberculosis treatment, and there was little evidence of associated harms.
abstract.textZh: 與單獨使用SOC或SOC加上經驗性結核病治療相比，經驗性纈更昔洛韋治療似乎與嚴重HIV相關性肺炎嬰兒的死亡風險較低，且幾乎沒有相關危害的證據。

articles.titleZh: 在非洲使用纈更昔洛韋對HIV感染嬰兒和住院重症肺炎嬰兒進行實驗性治療：一項多中心、開放標籤、因子、隨機、對照、優勢試驗

articles.title: Fibromyalgia
articles.authors: Williams DA, Clauw DJ

abstract.text: Fibromyalgia is characterized by widespread pain involving any body tissue and typically accompanied by fatigue and problems with sleep, mood, and memory. Fibromyalgia can occur alone or in combination with other chronic overlapping primary pain conditions, or it can be superimposed on other conditions, such as autoimmune disorders (secondary pain). In fibromyalgia, the central nervous system (CNS) is hyperresponsive to sensory stimuli generally. Successful pharmacologic and nonpharmacologic interventions focus on the CNS to support CNS quiescence and a return to homeostasis. Although fibromyalgia is rarely curable, most cases can be well managed in the context of primary care.
abstract.textZh: 纖維肌痛的特徵是涉及任何身體組織的廣泛疼痛，通常伴有疲勞和睡眠、情緒和記憶問題。纖維肌痛可以單獨發生，也可以與其他慢性重疊的原發性疼痛病症聯合發生，或者可以疊加在其他病症上，例如自身免疫性疾病（繼發性疼痛）。在纖維肌痛中，中樞神經系統（ CNS ）通常對感官刺激過度反應。成功的藥理學和非藥理學幹預集中在中樞神經系統，以支持中樞神經系統靜止和恢復動態穩定。雖然纖維肌痛很少可以治癒，但大多數病例可以在初級保健的背景下得到很好的處理。

articles.title: Health Care-Associated Infections in U.S. Hospitals, 2023 versus 2015
articles.authors: Chea N, Li R, Eure T, Alkis Ramirez R, Nadle J, Lee JE, Lehmann M, Sardenga L, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Prevalence surveys in U.S. hospitals showed that on any given day, 1 of 25 patients had a health care-associated infection in 2011, as compared with 1 of 31 patients in 2015. We repeated the survey in 2023 to assess changes in the prevalence of such infections.
abstract.textZh: 美國醫院的患病率調查顯示，在任何一天， 2011年25名患者中有1名患有與醫療保健相關的感染，而2015年為31名患者中的1名。我們在2023年再次進行調查，以評估此類感染率的變化。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: Using established methods, 10 Emerging Infections Program (EIP) sites recruited up to 25 hospitals each. Hospitals selected a survey day between May 1 and September 30, 2023. EIP staff reviewed medical records of randomly selected patients to identify health care-associated infections using National Healthcare Safety Network definitions. We described patient and hospital characteristics, compared the prevalence of health care-associated infections in 2023 and 2015, and estimated the national burden of health care-associated infections in 2023.
abstract.textZh: 使用既定方法， 10個新興感染計劃（ EIP ）研究中心招募了多達25家醫院。醫院選擇在2023年5月1日至9月30日期間進行問卷調查。EIP工作人員使用國家醫療保健安全網絡的定義，審查隨機選擇患者的醫療記錄，以識別與醫療保健相關的感染。我們描述了患者和醫院的特徵，比較了2023年和2015年醫療保健相關感染的患病率，並估計了2023年醫療保健相關感染的國家負擔。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: In 2023, of 13,653 patients in 218 hospitals, 355 (2.6%; 95% confidence interval [CI], 2.3 to 2.9) had at least one health care-associated infection, as compared with 394 of 12,299 patients (3.2%; 95% CI, 2.9 to 3.5) in 199 hospitals in 2015. Approximately 60% of the health care-associated infections were not associated with devices or procedures. Among 151 hospitals in both surveys, patients were less likely to have a health care-associated infection in 2023 than in 2015, after adjustment for other factors (risk ratio, 0.73; 95% CI, 0.63 to 0.85). We estimated that there were 518,000 health care-associated infections (95% CI, 494,500 to 542,000) in U.S. hospitals in 2023.
abstract.textZh: 2023年，在218家醫院的13,653名患者中， 355名（ 2.6% ； 95%置信區間[CI] ， 2.3至2.9 ）至少有一例與醫療保健相關的感染，而2015年199家醫院的12,299名患者中有394名（ 3.2% ； 95% CI ， 2.9至3.5 ）。大約60%的醫療保健相關感染與設備或程序無關。在兩項調查的151家醫院中，經調整其他因素（風險比率為0.73 ； 95% CI為0.63至0.85 ）後，患者在2023年與醫療保健相關感染的可能性較2015年為低。我們估計， 2023年美國醫院有518,000例與醫療保健相關的感染（ 95 ％ CI ， 494,500至542,000 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: The prevalence of health care-associated infections was lower in 2023 than in 2015, with 1 of 38 patients on any given day having such an infection; however, the burden of health care-associated infections in U.S. hospitals continued to be high. A majority of the health care-associated infections that were identified were not associated with a device or procedure. (Funded by the Emerging Infections Program cooperative agreement from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.).
abstract.textZh: 2023年醫療保健相關感染的患病率低於2015年，在任何一天， 38名患者中有1名患有此類感染；然而，美國醫院的醫療保健相關感染負擔仍然很高。已確認的大多數與醫療保健相關的感染與設備或程序無關。（由疾病控制和預防中心的新興感染計劃合作協議資助。）。

articles.titleZh: 美國醫院的醫療保健相關感染， 2023年與2015年

articles.title: Extended Dual Antiplatelet Therapy for Multivessel Coronary Artery Disease
articles.authors: Tian J, Wang Z, Wang Y, Wang F, Peng X, Xiao J, Li C, Hou X, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Patients with multivessel coronary artery disease often receive 12 months of dual antiplatelet therapy (DAPT) after stenting to reduce the risk of ischemic events. Whether extending DAPT beyond 12 months in event-free patients with multivessel disease provides a benefit is uncertain.
abstract.textZh: 多支血管冠狀動脈疾病患者通常在支架置入後接受12個月的雙重抗血小板治療（ DAPT ） ，以降低缺血事件的風險。在無事件的多支血管疾病患者中，是否將DAPT延長超過12個月仍不確定。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted an open-label, randomized trial at 97 centers in China. Patients 18 to 75 years of age with multivessel coronary artery disease who had no major ischemic or bleeding events while receiving DAPT for 12 months after implantation of a drug-eluting stent were randomly assigned in a 1:1 ratio to receive an additional 12 months of DAPT (clopidogrel plus aspirin) or aspirin monotherapy. The primary efficacy end point was a composite of death from cardiovascular causes, nonfatal myocardial infarction, or nonfatal stroke. The primary safety end point was clinically relevant or major bleeding (i.e., a bleeding event of Bleeding Academic Research Consortium [BARC] type ≥2; BARC types range from 0 to 5, with higher values indicating greater severity of bleeding).
abstract.textZh: 我們在中國97個中心進行了一項開放標籤的隨機試驗。18至75歲的多血管冠狀動脈疾病患者，在植入藥物洗滌支架後接受DAPT 12個月期間沒有發生重大缺血或出血事件，按1: 1的比例隨機分配接受額外12個月的DAPT （氯吡格雷加阿司匹林）或阿司匹林單一治療。主要療效終點是死於心血管疾病、非致命性心肌梗死或非致命性中風的綜合症。主要安全終點是臨牀相關或大出血（即出血學術研究聯盟[BARC]類型≥ 2的出血事件； BARC類型範圍從0到5 ，數值越高表示出血的嚴重程度越高）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 8250 patients were randomly assigned to receive extended DAPT (4125 patients) or aspirin monotherapy (4125 patients). The median follow-up was 34.3 months. A primary efficacy end-point event occurred in 222 patients in the DAPT group and in 266 patients in the aspirin-monotherapy group (36-month Kaplan-Meier cumulative incidence, 5.8% vs. 6.8%; hazard ratio, 0.82; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.69 to 0.98; P = 0.03). Clinically relevant or major bleeding occurred in 51 patients in the DAPT group and in 57 patients in the aspirin-monotherapy group (36-month Kaplan-Meier cumulative incidence, 1.4% vs. 1.5%; hazard ratio, 0.89; 95% CI, 0.61 to 1.30; P = 0.54).
abstract.textZh: 總共8250名患者被隨機分配接受延長DAPT （ 4125名患者）或阿司匹林單一治療（ 4125名患者）。中位隨訪時間為34.3個月。主要療效終點事件發生在DAPT組的222名患者和阿司匹林單藥治療組的266名患者中（ 36個月Kaplan-Meier累積發生率， 5.8%對6.8% ；風險比率， 0.82 ； 95%置信區間[CI] ， 0.69至0.98 ； P = 0.03 ）。DAPT組的51名患者和阿司匹林單藥治療組的57名患者發生臨牀相關或嚴重出血（ 36個月Kaplan-Meier累積發生率， 1.4%對1.5% ；風險比率， 0.89 ； 95% CI ， 0.61至1.30 ； P = 0.54 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with multivessel coronary artery disease who were in stable condition 12 months after implantation of a drug-eluting stent, extending DAPT with clopidogrel and aspirin for an additional 12 months led to a lower risk of death from cardiovascular causes, nonfatal myocardial infarction, or nonfatal stroke than continuing aspirin alone, without an increased risk of bleeding. (Funded by the National Natural Science Foundation of China and others; DAPT-MVD ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04624854.).
abstract.textZh: 在植入藥物洗滌支架12個月後狀況穩定的多血管冠狀動脈疾病患者中，使用氯吡格雷和阿司匹林將DAPT再延長12個月，導致心血管疾病、非致命性心肌梗塞或非致命性中風的死亡風險比單獨使用阿司匹林更低，而不會增加出血風險。（由中國國家自然科學基金會等資助； DAPT-MVD ClinicalTrials.gov編號： NCT04624854 ）。

articles.titleZh: 多支冠狀動脈疾病的延伸雙重抗血小板治療

articles.title: Continuous or Fixed-Duration Maintenance Therapy in Multiple Myeloma
articles.authors: Kumar S, Jacobus S, Cohen A, Weiss M, Callander N, Singh A, Parker T, Green M, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Current treatment of newly diagnosed multiple myeloma involves lenalidomide maintenance therapy given until disease progression. The appropriate duration of maintenance therapy with lenalidomide has been unclear.
abstract.textZh: 目前對新診斷多發性骨髓瘤的治療包括給予來那度胺維持治療，直到疾病惡化為止。來那度胺維持治療的適當持續時間尚不清楚。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 3 trial, we enrolled patients with standard-risk newly diagnosed multiple myeloma who were not undergoing up-front autologous stem-cell transplantation. After induction treatment with a proteasome inhibitor-lenalidomide combination, patients were randomly assigned to receive indefinite-duration (continuous) lenalidomide or fixed-duration lenalidomide (for 2 years). The primary end point was overall survival; the trial had 80% power to detect a 50% increase in median survival (from 5 years to 7.5 years), with a two-sided alpha level of 5%, 395 patients undergoing randomization, and 204 deaths occurring during 9 years of follow-up.
abstract.textZh: 在這項3期試驗中，我們招募了未接受前期自體幹細胞移植的標準風險新診斷多發性骨髓瘤患者。在使用蛋白酶體抑制劑-來那度胺組合進行誘導治療後，患者被隨機分配接受不定期（連續）來那度胺或固定持續時間的來那度胺（持續2年）。主要終點是總生存期；該試驗有80%的檢定力來檢測中位生存期（從5年增加到7.5年）增加50% ，雙側α水平為5% ， 395名患者進行隨機分組， 204名患者在9年的隨訪期間死亡。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: At the end of induction, 516 patients were randomly assigned to the indefinite-duration group (260 patients) or the fixed-duration group (256 patients). At a median follow-up of 86 months, overall survival did not differ significantly between the groups. With 80 deaths in each group, overall survival at 7 years was 68.6% in the indefinite-duration group and 69.0% in the fixed-duration group (difference, -0.4 percentage points; 95 confidence interval [CI], -9.0 to 8.3; P = 0.93). Progression-free survival at 7 years was 36.1% in the indefinite-duration group and 29.7% in the fixed-duration group (difference, 6.4 percentage points; 95% CI, -2.6 to 15.4). The 5-year cumulative incidence of second primary cancers, excluding nonmelanoma skin cancer, was 11.2% with indefinite-duration lenalidomide and 8.3% with fixed-duration lenalidomide. More adverse events occurred with indefinite-duration lenalidomide; the incidence of nonhematologic events of grade 3 or higher was 48.2% with indefinite-duration therapy and 31.5% with fixed-duration therapy.
abstract.textZh: 在歸化結束時， 516名患者被隨機分配到無限期組（ 260名患者）或固定期組（ 256名患者）。 在中位隨訪86個月時，兩組之間的總生存期沒有顯著差異。 每組80例死亡， 7年總生存率在無限期組中為68.6% ，在固定期組中為69.0% （差異， -0.4個百分點； 95個置信區間[CI] ， -9.0至8.3 ； P = 0.93 ）。 7年時的無惡化存活率在無限期組中為36.1% ，在固定期組中為29.7% （差異為6.4個百分點； 95% CI ， -2.6至15.4 ）。 第二原發癌症（不包括非黑色素瘤皮膚癌）的5年累計發生率，在使用無限期來那度胺時為11.2% ，在使用固定期來那度胺時為8.3%。 不確定持續時間來那度胺發生的不良事件較多；不確定持續時間治療的3級或以上非血液學事件發生率為48.2% ，固定持續時間治療的發生率為31.5%。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In this phase 3 trial involving patients with standard-risk newly diagnosed multiple myeloma who were not undergoing up-front autologous stem-cell transplantation, indefinite-duration maintenance therapy after induction therapy did not result in significantly longer overall survival than fixed-duration maintenance therapy. (Funded by the National Cancer Institute of the National Institutes of Health and Amgen; ENDURANCE ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT01863550.).
abstract.textZh: 在這項涉及標準風險的新診斷多發性骨髓瘤患者且未接受前期自體幹細胞移植的3期試驗中，誘導治療後的無限期維持治療並未導致比固定持續期維持治療顯著更長的總生存期。（由國立衛生研究院國家癌症研究所和安進資助； ENDURANCE ClinicalTrials.gov編號， NCT01863550。）。

articles.titleZh: 多發性骨髓瘤的連續或固定持續期間維持治療

articles.title: Bundibugyo Virus Disease in 2026 - Clinical and Public Health Responses
articles.authors: Sullivan NJ

abstract.text: Bundibugyo virus is a relatively rare orthoebolavirus that has caused only two previously recognized disease outbreaks but remains capable of producing severe epidemic disease with substantial mortality. The 2026 outbreak of Bundibugyo virus disease in the Democratic Republic of Congo has highlighted persistent challenges in the detection of filovirus disease outbreaks, as well as in diagnosis, clinical management, and the public health response, particularly in resource-limited settings. As with other filovirus infections, effective control of the Bundibugyo virus disease outbreak depends on rapid identification of cases, laboratory confirmation of infection, isolation of cases, contact tracing, infection-prevention measures, protection of health care workers, and community engagement. Although no licensed vaccines or approved therapeutics specific to Bundibugyo virus disease are currently available, advances in supportive care have improved outcomes during recent filovirus disease outbreaks. Experimental evidence from studies involving nonhuman primates, serologic investigations with human samples, and monoclonal antibody research suggests that vaccines and therapeutics developed against Ebola virus may provide cross-protective activity against Bundibugyo virus. These observations support prototype-pathogen approaches to preparedness while underscoring the need for continued development of pathogen-specific countermeasures. The current outbreak reinforces the principle that a successful response to filovirus disease requires integration of medical countermeasures, clinical care, surveillance, diagnostics, and coordinated multinational public health operations.
abstract.textZh: Bundibugyo病毒是一種相對罕見的orthoebolavirus ，僅導致兩次先前確認的疾病爆發，但仍然能夠產生嚴重的流行病，死亡率很高。 2026年剛果民主共和國爆發的Bundibugyo病毒病突顯了在檢測絲狀病毒疾病爆發、診斷、臨牀管理和公共衛生應對方面持續存在的挑戰，特別是在資源有限的環境中。 與其他絲狀病毒感染一樣，有效控制Bundibugyo病毒病爆發取決於病例的快速識別、感染的實驗室確認、病例的隔離、接觸者追蹤、感染預防措施、醫護人員的保護和社區參與。 雖然目前沒有針對Bundibugyo病毒病的許可疫苗或批準的治療方法，但在最近的絲狀病毒病爆發期間，支持性護理的進步改善了結果。 涉及非人類靈長類動物的研究、人類樣本的血清學調查和單株抗體研究的實驗證據表明，針對伊波拉病毒開發的疫苗和治療方法可能提供針對Bundibugyo病毒的交叉保護活性。 這些觀察支持原型病原體的準備方法，同時強調繼續開發病原體特異性對策的必要性。 目前的疫情加強了這一原則

articles.titleZh: 2026年Bundibugyo病毒病-臨牀和公共衛生對策

articles.title: Efficacy and Safety of Obinutuzumab in Active Systemic Lupus Erythematosus
articles.authors: Furie RA, Dall'Era M, Vital EM, Garg JP, Irazoque Palazuelos F, Zuta Santillán AE, Ravelo-Hernández J, Santiago MB, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Obinutuzumab, a glycoengineered type II anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody, induces potent B-cell depletion and is approved for the treatment of active lupus nephritis. Its efficacy and safety in patients with active systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) are yet to be determined.
abstract.textZh: Obinutuzumab是一種糖基工程化II型抗CD20單株抗體，可誘導強效B細胞消耗，並被批準用於治療活躍性狼瘡腎炎。其對活動性系統性紅斑狼瘡(SLE)患者的療效和安全性尚待確定。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a phase 3, multicenter, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial involving adults with active SLE but without proliferative or membranous lupus nephritis who were receiving standard therapy. Patients were randomly assigned in a 1:1 ratio to receive obinutuzumab (1000 mg) or placebo on day 1 and weeks 2, 24, and 26. In the prespecified analysis, the primary end point at week 52 was a response on the SLE Responder Index 4 (SRI-4), defined by a reduction from baseline of at least 4 points in the Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Disease Activity Index 2000 (SLEDAI-2K) score, no worsening of disease as assessed by the British Isles Lupus Assessment Group (BILAG) 2004 index and Physician's Global Assessment, and no intercurrent events (i.e., major concomitant-therapy violation, receipt of rescue medication, or early discontinuation of trial participation due to death, lack of efficacy, or adverse events).
abstract.textZh: 我們進行了一項3期、多中心、雙盲、安慰劑對照試驗，涉及接受標準治療的活躍SLE但沒有增生性或膜性狼瘡腎炎的成年人。患者在第1天、第2週、第24週和第26週以1: 1的比例被隨機分配接受obinutuzumab (1000 mg)或安慰劑。在預先指定的分析中，第52週的主要終點是SLE反應者指數4 (SRI-4)的反應，定義為系統性紅斑狼瘡疾病活動指數2000 (SLEDAI-2K)評分相較於基線至少降低4分，根據不列顛羣島紅斑狼瘡評估小組(BILAG) 2004指數和醫師全球評估的評估，疾病沒有惡化，且沒有同時發生的事件(即違反重大伴隨治療、接受急救藥物，或因死亡、缺乏療效或不良事件而提早停止試驗參與)。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 303 patients who underwent randomization, 151 were assigned to receive obinutuzumab and 152 to receive placebo. At week 52, an SRI-4 response was observed in 76.7% of the patients in the obinutuzumab group and in 53.5% of those in the placebo group (adjusted difference, 23.1 percentage points; 95% confidence interval [CI], 12.5 to 33.6; P<0.001). In an additional analysis whereby nonfatal intercurrent events did not affect response status, the respective percentages were 85.4% and 68.5% (adjusted difference, 16.8 percentage points; 95% CI, 7.1 to 26.4). Obinutuzumab was superior to placebo with respect to all key secondary end points: BILAG-based Composite Lupus Assessment response, sustained reduction in glucocorticoid dose, sustained SRI-4 response, SRI-6 response, and time to first BILAG-defined flare. Adverse events were reported in 88.7% of the patients in the obinutuzumab group and in 81.5% of those in the placebo group, and serious adverse events in 15.9% and 11.9%, respectively. One patient in the obinutuzumab group and 3 in the placebo group died during the double-blind period.
abstract.textZh: 在接受隨機分組的303名患者中， 151名被分配接受obinutuzumab ， 152名接受安慰劑。 在第52週，在obinutuzumab組中76.7%的患者和安慰劑組中53.5%的患者中觀察到SRI-4反應（調整差異， 23.1個百分點； 95%置信區間[CI] ， 12.5至33.6 ； P < 0.001 ）。 在另一項非致命同期事件不影響緩解狀態的分析中，相應百分比為85.4%和68.5% （調整差異， 16.8個百分點； 95% CI ， 7.1至26.4 ）。 Obinutuzumab在所有關鍵次要終點方面均優於安慰劑：基於BILAG的綜合紅斑狼瘡評估反應、糖皮質激素劑量持續減少、持續SRI-4反應、SRI-6反應和至首次BILAG定義的發作時間。 Obinutuzumab組中88.7%的患者和安慰劑組中81.5%的患者報告了不良事件，嚴重不良事件分別為15.9%和11.9%。 Obinutuzumab組中的1名患者和安慰劑組中的3名患者在雙盲期間死亡。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among adults with active SLE, treatment with obinutuzumab was superior to placebo with respect to the primary and all key secondary end points. (Funded by F. Hoffmann-La Roche; ALLEGORY ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04963296.).
abstract.textZh: 在患有活動性SLE的成年人中， obinutuzumab治療在主要終點和所有關鍵次要終點方面優於安慰劑。（由F. Hoffmann-La Roche資助；寓言ClinicalTrials.gov編號， NCT04963296。）。

articles.titleZh: Obinutuzumab在活動性系統性紅斑狼瘡中的療效和安全性

articles.title: Hip Fractures: A Review
articles.authors: Johannesdottir F, Roberts JE, Kiel DP, Tsai JN

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: More than 14.2 million people worldwide and 280 000 in the US experience a hip fracture each year. The median 1-year mortality rate after a hip fracture is 22% and approximately 42% to 71% of patients regain their prefracture level of basic activities of daily living within 6 months.
abstract.textZh: 全球每年有超過1420萬人和美國有28萬人經歷臀部骨折。髖部骨折後的1年死亡率中位數為22% ，約42%至71%的患者在6個月內恢復其骨折前日常生活的基本活動水平。

abstract.label: OBSERVATIONS
abstract.text: Hip fractures are classified as intracapsular or extracapsular and most commonly occur after a fall. Intracapsular hip fractures include femoral neck (34%) and femoral head (rare). Extracapsular fractures consist of intertrochanteric (48%) and subtrochanteric fractures (5.8%). In the US, between 2008 and 2017, hip fractures were associated with 1-year mortality rates of 26.9% among men and 18.5% among women. Older age is a major risk factor for hip fracture, with a hazard ratio of 1.35 (95% CI, 1.25-1.47) per 5-year increase in age. Women have higher incidence of hip fractures than men due to accelerated bone loss after menopause and higher incidence of falls. Other risk factors for hip fractures include low bone mineral density (bone density of 1 SD or below that of healthy young adults measured by dual-energy x-ray absorptiometry), prior fracture, and factors contributing to falls, such as weak muscles, poor visual acuity, and smoking. Surgery for hip fracture typically consists of hip joint replacement or hip joint stabilization, using embedded hardware (open reduction and internal fixation). Patients with hip fracture benefit from physical therapy and fall reduction strategies, such as muscle-strengthening exercises and modifying medications associated with increased fall risk, such as antidepressants, and should be treated with antiresorptive medications, such as bisphosphonates (alendronate, zoledronic acid) or denosumab to prevent subsequent fracture. To prevent a hip fracture, patients with vertebral osteoporosis at the spine may require anabolic therapy, such as teriparatide, abaloparatide, or romosozumab, before starting an antiresorptive. Hip fractures may lead to mobility limitations; declines in physical, emotional, and social functioning; and reduced health-related quality of life.
abstract.textZh: 臀部骨折分為囊內或囊外，最常發生在跌倒後。 髖關節囊內骨折包括股骨頸（ 34% ）和股骨頭（罕見）。 包膜外骨折包括股骨粗隆間骨折（ 48% ）和股骨粗隆下骨折（ 5.8% ）。 在美國， 2008年至2017年間，髖部骨折與1年死亡率有關，男性為26.9% ，女性為18.5%。 年齡較大是髖部骨折的主要風險因素，年齡增加5年的風險比為1.35 （ 95 ％ CI ， 1.25-1.47 ）。 由於更年期後骨質流失加速和跌倒發生率較高，女性的臀部骨折發生率高於男性。 髖部骨折的其他風險因素包括骨密度低（通過雙能X射線吸收法測量的骨密度為1 SD或低於健康年輕人的骨密度）、既往骨折以及導致跌倒的因素，例如肌肉無力、視力差和吸煙。 髖關節骨折的手術通常包括使用嵌入式硬件（開放式復位和內固定）進行髖關節置換或髖關節穩定。 臀部骨折患者受益於物理治療和減輕跌倒的策略，例如肌肉強化運動和修改與跌倒風險增加相關的藥物，例如抗抑鬱藥，並應使用抗吸收藥物治療，例如雙膦酸鹽（阿侖膦酸鹽、唑來膦酸）或地諾單抗以預防隨後的骨折。 為了防止臀部

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Hip fractures are common among older people and are associated with a 1-year mortality rate of 22% and with reduced mobility and quality of life. Surgical repair for hip fracture typically consists of joint replacement or open reduction and internal fixation. Hip fracture treatment also includes physical therapy, fall reduction strategies, and medications to protect against fracture, such as bisphosphonates; denosumab; or anabolic drugs, such as parathyroid hormone analogues or romosozumab.
abstract.textZh: 臀部骨折在老年人中很常見，並且與1年死亡率22 ％以及行動能力和生活質量降低有關。髖部骨折的手術修復通常包括關節置換或開放式復位和內固定。臀部骨折治療還包括物理治療、減輕跌倒策略和預防骨折的藥物，如雙膦酸鹽；地諾單抗；或合成代謝藥物，如甲狀旁腺激素類似物或romosozumab。
