articles.title: Sustaining named GP continuity requires organisational change: comparative implementation analysis in Finland
articles.authors: Tuompo W, Mäkelä J, Timonen M, Auvinen J

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Maintaining doctor-patient relationship continuity remains a challenge in public primary care in Finland and internationally due to general practitioner (GP) workforce pressures and organisational constraints.
abstract.textZh: 由於全科醫生（ GP ）的勞動力壓力和組織限制，維持醫患關係的連續性仍然是芬蘭和國際公共初級保健的挑戰。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To evaluate implementation of a named GP model and explain differences in implementation outcomes between two Finnish primary care units.
abstract.textZh: 評估指定的全科醫生模式的實施情況，並解釋芬蘭兩個初級保健單位之間實施結果的差異。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: A quasi-experimental before-after study was conducted in two Finnish primary care units with contrasting organisational settings. Patients were assigned a named GP responsible for non-urgent care. Electronic health record data covering physician consultations over 48 months were analysed.
abstract.textZh: 在兩個芬蘭初級保健單位中進行了準實驗性事前事後研究，組織環境形成對比。患者被指派負責非緊急護理的指定全科醫生。分析了涵蓋48個月內醫師會診的電子健康記錄數據。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: Continuity was measured using the Usual Provider of Care Index (UPC), the St Leonard's Index of Continuity of Care (SLICC), and the Own Patient Ratio (OPR). Implementation outcomes were interpreted using the RE-AIM framework. A segmented Interrupted Time Series (ITS) model was applied to OPR and SLICC, and UPC analysed using a pre-post design.
abstract.textZh: 使用常用護理提供者指數（ UPC ）、聖倫納德護理持續性指數（ SLICC ）和自身患者比率（ OPR ）來測量連續性。實施結果使用RE-AIM框架來解釋。將分段中斷時間序列（ ITS ）模型應用於OPR和SLICC ，並使用後期設計分析UPC。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Named GP continuity was higher in Tuira than in Pudasjärvi across all measures. In Tuira, adoption (OPR 0.88) was high and stable with lower named GP-level variation, while reach (SLICC 0.31) and effectiveness (UPC 0.35) improved but remained modest. Although continuity improved in Pudasjärvi, adoption remained weaker (OPR 0.40), reach lower (SLICC 0.16), and maintenance less stable. Continuity of care with physicians other than the named GP increased more in Pudasjärvi.
abstract.textZh: 在所有措施中， Tuira的命名GP連續性都高於Pudasjärvi。在圖伊拉，採用率（ OPR 0.88 ）高且穩定， GP水平變化較低，而REACH （ SLICC 0.31 ）和有效性（ UPC 0.35 ）有所改善，但仍然適度。雖然Pudasjärvi的連續性有所改善，但採用率仍然較弱（ OPR 0.40 ） ，達到較低（ SLICC 0.16 ） ，維護不太穩定。在Pudasjärvi ，除了指定的全科醫生之外，其他醫生的持續護理增加更多。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The named GP model was functionally adopted in Tuira but remained largely nominal in Pudasjärvi. Health systems implementing named GP models should prioritise sustained GP presence and organisational alignment to achieve continuity.
abstract.textZh: 命名的GP模型在Tuira功能上採用，但在Pudasjärvi基本上保持名義。實施指定GP模型的衛生系統應優先考慮持續的GP存在和組織一致性，以實現連續性。

articles.titleZh: 維持指定的全科醫生連續性需要組織變革：芬蘭的比較實施分析

articles.title: Andes Virus - A Clinical Review
articles.authors: Harris GH, Sinchi A, Lawler J, Frank M

abstract.text: Andes virus (ANDV) is the sole orthohantavirus with documented human-to-human transmission. We summarize the epidemiology and clinical features of ANDV infection and review best practices in clinical management, as based on published expert consensus guidelines, field experience, and clinical trials. We also evaluate currently available and investigational treatments (including the use of antiviral agents), assess emerging monoclonal antibody therapies, and outline prospects for vaccine development. Finally, we discuss important infection prevention and control measures.
abstract.textZh: 安第斯病毒（ ANDV ）是唯一有記錄的人傳人傳播的骨幹病毒。我們根據已發表的專家共識指南、現場經驗和臨牀試驗，總結ANDV感染的流行病學和臨牀特徵，並回顧臨牀管理的最佳實踐。我們還評估目前可用的治療和研究治療（包括使用抗病毒藥物） ，評估新興的單株抗體療法，並概述疫苗開發的前景。最後，我們討論了重要的感染預防和控制措施。

articles.titleZh: 安第斯病毒-臨牀綜述

articles.title: Prognostic Value of Blood-Based P-Tau217 Levels for Progression to Cognitive Impairment
articles.authors: Buckley RF, Townsend DL, Birkenbihl CJ, Cuppels M, Coughlan GT, Seto MT, Brown JA, Properzi MJ, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Blood-based biomarkers for Alzheimer disease, particularly plasma phosphorylated tau 217 (p-tau217), accurately reflect early Alzheimer disease brain pathology in cognitively unimpaired individuals, but estimates of absolute risk of progression to cognitive impairment across multiple cohorts are needed.
abstract.textZh: 阿爾茨海默氏病的血液生物標誌物，特別是血漿磷酸化的tau 217 （ p-tau217 ） ，準確地反映了認知能力未受損的個體的早期阿爾茨海默氏病腦部病理學，但需要估計多個隊列中發展為認知障礙的絕對風險。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate absolute risk of progression to cognitive impairment and rates of cognitive decline based on plasma p-tau217 across cognitively unimpaired older adults.
abstract.textZh: 根據未受認知障礙的老年人血漿p-tau217 ，估計進展為認知障礙的絕對風險和認知衰退率。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Longitudinal cohort study using harmonized data from 2684 cognitively unimpaired older adults (defined within cohort) across 6 observational and clinical trial cohorts based in North America, Japan, and Australia. The earliest enrollment was in 2004, with most recent follow-up in 2025.
abstract.textZh: 縱向隊列研究使用來自北美、日本和澳大利亞的6個觀察和臨牀試驗隊列中2684名認知未受損老年人（在隊列中定義）的統一數據。最早的入組是在2004年，最近的追蹤是在2025年。

abstract.label: EXPOSURE
abstract.text: Baseline plasma p-tau217.
abstract.textZh: 基線血漿p-tau217。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary outcome was time to progression to cognitive impairment (mild cognitive impairment, dementia, or 2 consecutive global Clinical Dementia Rating scores ≥0.5). The secondary outcome was longitudinal change on the latent Preclinical Alzheimer Cognitive Composite (PACC; higher values indicate better performance).
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是進展到認知障礙的時間（輕度認知障礙、失智症或2個連續的全球臨牀失智症評級評分≥ 0.5 ）。次要結果是潛在的臨牀前阿茲海默症認知綜合指標（ PACC ；數值越高表示表現越好）的縱向變化。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among the 2684 participants (median [IQR] age, 69.6 [66.2-74.2] years; 1697 [63%] female), there were 478 events of progression to cognitive impairment over a median follow-up of 5.4 years (maximum follow-up of 13.5 years). Each 1-SD increase in baseline p-tau217 level was associated with an increased risk of progression to cognitive impairment (hazard ratio, 1.38 [95% CI, 1.30-1.46]), and the association remained significant after adjustment, including β-amyloid positron emission tomography scan Centiloids (hazard ratio, 1.32 [95% CI, 1.24-1.41]). Participants with high (1.1-2.4 SD) and very high (>2.5 SD) baseline p-tau217 had 24% (95% CI, 20%-28%) and 38% (95% CI, 33%-43%) absolute risk of progression over 5 years, respectively, and risk was markedly higher over 10 years, although longer-term estimates were constrained by limited data. Elevated p-tau217 was also associated with faster cognitive decline based on change in latent PACC score. Among the overall sample, baseline latent PACC scores ranged from -0.8 to 2.7. The 5-year annualized decline for the very high p-tau217 group was -0.07 latent PACC units/y (95% CI, -0.10 to -0.05), relative to 0.03 units/y (95% CI, 0.02-0.04) in the low p-tau217 group.
abstract.textZh: 在2684名參與者（中位[IQR]年齡， 69.6 [66.2-74.2]歲； 1697 [63%]女性）中，有478例進展為認知障礙的事件，中位隨訪時間為5.4年（最長隨訪時間為13.5年）。 基線期p-tau217水平的每一次1-SD增加都與進展為認知障礙的風險增加有關（風險比， 1.38 [95% CI ， 1.30-1.46] ） ，且調整後相關性仍然顯著，包括β-澱粉樣蛋白正電子發射斷層掃描Centiloids （風險比， 1.32 [95% CI ， 1.24-1.41] ）。 具有高（ 1.1-2.4 SD ）和極高（ > 2.5 SD ）基線p-tau217的參與者在5年內分別有24% （ 95% CI ， 20% -28% ）和38% （ 95% CI ， 33% -43% ）的絕對進展風險，且在10年內風險顯著更高，儘管較長期的估計受到有限數據的限制。 根據潛在PACC評分的變化， p-tau217升高也與更快的認知衰退相關。 在整體樣本中，基線期潛在PACC評分範圍為-0.8至2.7。 極高p-tau217組的5年年化降幅為-0.07潛在PACC單位/年（ 95% CI ， -0.10至-0.05 ） ，相對於低p-tau217組的0.03單位/年（ 95% CI ， 0.02-0.04 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: In a pooled sample of multiple selected cohorts of cognitively unimpaired older adults, higher plasma p-tau217 levels were consistently associated with increased risk of clinical progression and accelerated cognitive decline. By providing time-specific absolute risk estimates, these findings support the potential of p-tau217 for prognostic model development, with direct implications for future trial design. Further validation in unselected populations is needed to inform individual prognosis and clinical decision-making in cognitively unimpaired individuals.
abstract.textZh: 在多個選擇的認知未受損老年人羣組的混合樣本中，較高的血漿p-tau217水平始終與臨牀進展風險增加和認知衰退加速有關。通過提供特定時間的絕對風險估計，這些發現支持p-tau217對預後模型開發的潛力，對未來的試驗設計具有直接影響。需要在未經選擇的人羣中進一步驗證，以為認知無障礙個體的個人預後和臨牀決策提供信息。

articles.titleZh: 基於血液的P-Tau217水平對進展為認知障礙的預後價值

articles.title: Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists and Risk for Ischemic Optic Neuropathy : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Reynolds KR, O'Malley KM, Roy JA, Dave CV

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: There are few data evaluating the association between glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RAs) and nonarteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy (NAION), which constitutes approximately 75% of ischemic optic neuropathy (ION) cases in adults.
abstract.textZh: 幾乎沒有數據評估胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RAs ）和非動脈炎性前部缺血性視神經病變（ NAION ）之間的關聯，這構成了成人缺血性視神經病變（ ION ）病例的大約75 ％。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the effect of GLP-1RAs versus sodium-glucose cotransporter-2 inhibitors (SGLT2is) and dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors (DPP4is) on risk for ION.
abstract.textZh: 估計GLP-1RA與鈉葡萄糖共轉運蛋白-2抑製劑（ SGLT2is ）和二肽基肽酶-4抑制劑（ DPP4is ）對離子風險的影響。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Observational emulation of a target trial.
abstract.textZh: 目標試驗的觀察模擬。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Large U.S.-based commercial claims database (January 2017 to December 2022).
abstract.textZh: 大型美國商業理賠數據庫（ 2017年1月至2022年12月）。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Patients aged 18 to 65 years with type 2 diabetes initiating a GLP-1RA, an SGLT2i, or a DPP4i.
abstract.textZh: 18至65歲的2型糖尿病患者開始GLP-1RA、SGLT2i或DPP4i。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: The primary outcome was incident ION as a proxy for NAION. Analyses adjusted for more than 80 covariates using inverse probability of treatment weights, and 18-month cumulative incidence and risk differences (RDs) per 10 000 patients were estimated.
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是事件ION作為NAION的代理。使用治療權重的反向概率對超過80個協變量進行調整的分析，並估算每10 000名患者的18個月累計發病率和風險差異（ RD ）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The 18-month risk for ION was 8.5 versus 5.5 per 10 000 among GLP-1RA users versus SGLT2i users (RD, 3.0 [95% CI, 0.4 to 5.7]) and 7.8 versus 4.2 per 10 000 among GLP-1RA users versus DPP4i users (RD, 3.6 [CI, 1.1 to 6.1]). Corresponding numbers needed to harm were 3333 and 2778, respectively. Among GLP-1RA users, 69 (85.2%) of the 81 ION events occurred in persons older than 50 years and 57 (70.3%) occurred in men. Risk differences were attenuated among metformin monotherapy users (2.0 and 4.1) compared with users of 2 or more diabetes medications (5.7 and 4.0) versus SGLT2is and DPP4is, respectively. Risk differences were higher in men, patients aged 50 years or older, and those with cardiovascular disease or ophthalmic conditions, with minimal differences in women and those younger than 50 years.
abstract.textZh: GLP-1RA使用者與SGLT2i使用者之間的18個月ION風險為8.5與5.5/10 000 （ RD ， 3.0 [95% CI ， 0.4至5.7] ） ， GLP-1RA使用者與DPP4i使用者之間的18個月ION風險為7.8與4.2/10 000 （ RD ， 3.6 [CI ， 1.1至6.1] ）。傷害所需的相應數字分別為3333和2778。在GLP-1RA使用者中， 81例離子事件中有69例（ 85.2 ％ ）發生在50歲以上的人羣中， 57例（ 70.3 ％ ）發生在男性中。二甲雙胍單一治療用戶（ 2.0和4.1 ）與2種或更多糖尿病藥物用戶（ 5.7和4.0 ）與SGLT2is和DPP4is之間的風險差異分別減弱。男性、50歲或以上患者、心血管疾病或眼科疾病患者的風險差異較大，女性和50歲以下患者的風險差異最小。

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: Diagnostic codes specifically for NAION were lacking. Missing data on key clinical factors (such as body mass index and type 2 diabetes duration) may contribute to residual confounding, leaving uncertainty about whether the observed association is causal.
abstract.textZh: 缺乏專門用於NAION的診斷代碼。缺少關鍵臨牀因素（如體重指數和2型糖尿病持續時間）的數據可能會導致殘留的混淆，使觀察到的關聯是否是因果關係的不確定性。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Use of GLP-1RAs was associated with higher 18-month risk for ION than use of SGLT2is and DPP4is, although absolute risk remained very low. Observed differences may reflect residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 使用GLP-1RA比使用SGLT2is和DPP4is具有更高的18個月離子風險，儘管絕對風險仍然非常低。觀察到的差異可能反映了殘留的混淆。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institutes of Health.
abstract.textZh: 國立衛生研究院。

articles.titleZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑和缺血性視神經病變的風險：靶向試驗模擬

articles.title: Modernizing the Regulatory Framework for Dietary Supplements: A Position Paper From the American College of Physicians
articles.authors: Cline K, Beachy MW, Carr PW, Health and Public Policy Committee of the American College of Physicians

abstract.text: In the United States, dietary supplements are regulated as a subcategory of food and therefore are not required to undergo review and approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This inadequate regulatory framework has allowed adulterated and mislabeled products to repeatedly enter the market and poses a health threat to the public. In this position paper, the American College of Physicians offers policy recommendations to bolster the FDA's pre- and postmarket regulatory authority for dietary supplements, standardize dietary supplement terminology and data sharing, and implement changes within the health care system to improve care for patients using dietary supplements.
abstract.textZh: 在美國，膳食補充劑作為食品的一個子類別受到監管，因此不需要經過美國食品和藥物管理局（ FDA ）的審查和批準。這種不充分的監管框架允許摻假和錯誤標籤的產品反覆進入市場，並對公眾構成健康威脅。在這份立場文件中，美國醫師學會提供政策建議，以加強FDA對膳食補充劑的上市前和上市後監管機構，標準化膳食補充劑術語和數據共享，並在醫療保健系統內實施變革，以改善對使用膳食補充劑的患者的護理。

articles.titleZh: 現代化膳食補充劑的法規框架：美國醫師學會的立場文件

articles.title: Comparative Effectiveness of Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists Versus Oral Agents for Insulin Discontinuation in Type 2 Diabetes : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Lipska KJ, Zawack K, Yan L, Mutalik P, Li J, Gulanski B, Ioannou GN, Aslan M

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Addition of glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RAs) to basal insulin can decrease insulin requirements, but whether it permits insulin discontinuation is unclear.
abstract.textZh: 在基礎胰島素中添加胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RAs ）可以降低胰島素需求，但它是否允許胰島素停藥尚不清楚。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To compare rates of insulin discontinuation among patients with type 2 diabetes (T2D) receiving basal insulin who initiated treatment with a GLP-1RA, sodium-glucose cotransporter-2 inhibitor (SGLT-2i), or dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitor (DPP-4i) between 2020 and 2022.
abstract.textZh: 比較2020年至2022年間接受基礎胰島素治療的2型糖尿病（ T2D ）患者的胰島素停藥率，這些患者開始使用GLP-1RA、鈉葡萄糖共轉運蛋白-2抑制劑（ SGLT-2i ）或二肽基肽酶-4抑制劑（ DPP-4i ）進行治療。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Target trial emulation.
abstract.textZh: 目標試用模擬。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: U.S. Veterans Health Administration electronic health record (EHR) data.
abstract.textZh: 美國退伍軍人健康管理局電子健康記錄（ EHR ）數據。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Veterans with T2D receiving basal insulin.
abstract.textZh: 接受基礎胰島素的T2D退伍軍人。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Insulin discontinuation, defined as the first gap in insulin prescription fills of 12 months or more over 3 years of follow-up.
abstract.textZh: 胰島素停藥，定義為3年隨訪期間胰島素處方填充12個月或更長時間的第一個間隙。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 8869 matched sets of GLP-1RA (76.6% semaglutide, 15.2% dulaglutide, 7.9% liraglutide, and 0.3% exenatide), SGLT-2i (99.7% empagliflozin), and DPP-4i (95.9% alogliptin) initiators, 63% were 65 years or older, 93% were male, 70% were White, and 48% had a hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level of 9% or more. Over 3 years of follow-up, 1480 (16.7%) GLP-1RA initiators compared with 1585 (17.9%) SGLT-2i initiators and 1517 (17.1%) DPP-4i initiators discontinued insulin therapy in the intention-to-treat analysis (risk ratio, 0.93 [95% CI, 0.86 to 1.01] and 0.98 [CI, 0.87 to 1.09] for the GLP-1RA arm compared with the SGLT-2i and DPP-4i arms, respectively). Results were not substantively different in a modified per protocol analysis. None of the subgroups showed a comparative advantage of GLP-1RAs with respect to insulin discontinuation over SGLT-2is or DPP-4is.
abstract.textZh: 在8869組匹配的GLP-1RA （ 76.6% semaglutide、15.2% dulaglutide、7.9% liraglutide和0.3% exenatide ）、SGLT-2i （ 99.7% empagliflozin ）和DPP-4i （ 95.9% alogliptin ）引發劑中， 63%為65歲或以上， 93%為男性， 70%為白人， 48%的血紅蛋白A1c （ HbA1c ）水平為9%或以上。在3年的追蹤中， 1480 （ 16.7 ％ ）個GLP-1RA啟動劑與1585 （ 17.9 ％ ）個SGLT-2i啟動劑和1517 （ 17.1 ％ ）個DPP-4i啟動劑在意向治療分析中停止了胰島素治療（ GLP-1RA組與SGLT-2i和DPP-4i組的風險比率分別為0.93 [95 ％ CI ， 0.86至1.01]和0.98 [CI ， 0.87至1.09] ）。修改後的每個計畫書分析結果並無實質差異。與SGLT-2is或DPP-4is相比，沒有任何次組顯示出GLP-1RA在胰島素停藥方面的比較優勢。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Possible residual confounding; misclassification of exposure and outcome using EHRs may bias associations toward the null.
abstract.textZh: 可能的殘留混淆；使用EHR對暴露和結果進行錯誤分類可能會使關聯偏向空值。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Among veterans with T2D receiving basal insulin therapy, addition of GLP-1RA did not increase the chances of stopping insulin therapy compared with SGLT-2i or DPP-4i therapy.
abstract.textZh: 在接受基礎胰島素治療的T2D退伍軍人中，與SGLT-2i或DPP-4i治療相比，加入GLP-1RA並未增加停止胰島素治療的機會。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs.
abstract.textZh: 美國退伍軍人事務部。

articles.titleZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑與口服藥物在2型糖尿病中胰島素停藥的比較有效性：靶向試驗模擬

articles.title: Obstructive Sleep Apnea
articles.authors: Donovan LM

abstract.text: Obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) is a common but frequently undiagnosed condition. Symptoms include loud snoring, nocturnal awakening, and daytime sleepiness. Treating OSA can meaningfully improve symptoms and achieve modest reductions in blood pressure. Although OSA care has traditionally been limited to sleep specialists, technologies are available that allow primary care clinicians to diagnose OSA and initiate treatment. Treatments include positional therapy, weight management, application of external positive airway pressure, mandibular advancement devices, and surgical interventions. Inpatient identification and management of OSA is also feasible and is an evolving area of research and practice.
abstract.textZh: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暫停（ OSA ）是一種常見但經常未被診斷的疾病。症狀包括大聲打鼾、夜間醒來和白天嗜睡。治療OSA可以有意義地改善症狀並適度降低血壓。雖然OSA護理傳統上僅限於睡眠專科醫生，但現有技術允許初級保健臨牀醫生診斷OSA並開始治療。治療包括體位治療、體重管理、外部氣道正壓應用、下顎前移裝置和手術幹預。OSA的住院患者識別和管理也是可行的，是一個不斷發展的研究和實踐領域。

articles.titleZh: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸中止

articles.title: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists and Risk for Anterior Ischemic Optic Neuropathy : A Nationwide Cohort Study
articles.authors: Ueda P, Svanström H, Söderling J, Pazzagli L, Wintzell V, Eliasson B, Hviid A, Pasternak B

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: There are concerns about a possible link between glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RAs) and nonarteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy (NAION).
abstract.textZh: 人們擔心胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RAs ）和非動脈炎性前部缺血性視神經病變（ NAION ）之間可能存在聯繫。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To examine whether use of GLP-1RAs increases risk for AION, which predominantly comprises NAION.
abstract.textZh: 檢查GLP-1RAs的使用是否會增加AION的風險， AION主要由NAION組成。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Nationwide, register-based, cohort study.
abstract.textZh: 全國性、以登記為基礎的隊列研究。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Sweden, 2013 to 2024.

abstract.label: PATIENTS
abstract.text: Initiators of GLP-1RAs compared with initiators of sodium-glucose cotransporter-2 (SGLT-2) inhibitors.
abstract.textZh: 與鈉葡萄糖共轉運蛋白-2 （ SGLT-2 ）抑制劑的起始物相比， GLP-1RA的起始物。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Anterior ischemic optic neuropathy in the national patient register. Adjusted risk differences (RDs) and risk ratios (RRs) were estimated using propensity score weighting.
abstract.textZh: 全國患者登記冊中的前部缺血性視神經病變。使用傾向評分加權估算調整後的風險差異(RD)和風險比率(RR)。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Median follow-up was 1.6 years (IQR, 0.7 to 3.1 years) for GLP-1RA users and 1.5 years (IQR, 0.7 to 2.9 years) for SGLT-2 inhibitor users. Sixty-two of 107 518 GLP-1RA users and 64 of 185 898 SGLT-2 inhibitor users experienced AION. Risks were 0.04% versus 0.02% (RD, 0.02% [95% CI, 0.00% to 0.03%]; RR, 1.93 [CI, 1.00 to 3.73]) at 1 year and 0.12% versus 0.07% (RD, 0.05% [CI, 0.00% to 0.10%]; RR, 1.69 [CI, 0.95 to 3.01]) at 5 years. The differences were substantially attenuated in analyses restricted to patients receiving metformin at baseline (1 year: RD, 0.01% [CI, -0.01% to 0.02%]; RR, 1.40 [CI, 0.64 to 3.05]; 3 years: RD, 0.01% [CI, -0.02% to 0.04%]; RR, 1.24 [CI, 0.68 to 2.26]; 5 years: RD, 0.02% [CI, -0.04% to 0.08%]; RR, 1.23 [CI, 0.65 to 2.33]).

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Few outcome events, unmeasured confounding, and limited generalizability to GLP-1RA users without diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 對於沒有糖尿病的GLP-1RA用戶，結局事件很少、無法測量的混淆，且可泛化性有限。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The relative risk for AION was higher with GLP-1RA use compared with SGLT-2 inhibitor use in type 2 diabetes. However, absolute risks were small, and the RDs were substantially reduced in analyses restricted to patients receiving metformin to better account for confounding by diabetes severity, suggesting observed increases in risk may reflect residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 與在2型糖尿病中使用SGLT-2抑制劑相比，使用GLP-1RA時AION的相對風險更高。然而，絕對風險很小，在僅限於接受二甲雙胍的患者的分析中， RD大幅降低，以更好地解釋糖尿病嚴重程度的混淆，這表明觀察到的風險增加可能反映了剩餘的混淆。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Karolinska Institutet, Swedish Society of Medicine, Swedish Research Council, and Region Stockholm.
abstract.textZh: Karolinska Institutet、瑞典醫學學會、瑞典研究委員會和斯德哥爾摩地區。

articles.titleZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑和前部缺血性視神經病變的風險：一項全國性隊列研究

articles.title: Platelet-Activating Anti-Platelet Factor 4 Disorders
articles.authors: Warkentin TE, Greinacher A

abstract.text: Platelet-activating antibodies against platelet factor 4 (PF4) cause highly prothrombotic disorders with reduced platelet counts. In heparin-induced thrombocytopenia (HIT), these antibodies bind PF4-heparin complexes, causing heparin-dependent platelet activation. Less common autoimmune and spontaneous HIT variants that are triggered by heparin and nonpharmacologic polyanions, respectively, have atypical clinical features and antibodies with additional heparin-independent platelet-activating properties. Vaccine-induced immune thrombocytopenia and thrombosis (VITT) antibodies directly target PF4. Initially, VITT was linked to adenoviral vector-based coronavirus disease 2019 vaccines, but in rare cases, an immune thrombocytopenia and thrombosis disorder that is clinically nearly identical to VITT can be caused by infection resulting from natural exposure to viruses, especially adenovirus. In persons with the IGLV3-21*02/*03 gene, anti-adenovirus protein VII antibody specificity shifts to PF4 by way of a specific somatic hypermutation (K31E) that creates VITT antibodies. In VITT-like monoclonal gammopathy of thrombotic significance, monoclonal anti-PF4 antibodies cause chronic prothrombotic conditions. Accurate diagnosis relies on distinct assays for HIT and VITT antibodies. Beyond anticoagulation, inhibition of FcγIIa receptor-mediated platelet activation may be needed for anti-PF4 disorders with heparin-independent reactivity (e.g., high-dose immune globulin in acute disease manifestations and Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitors in chronic manifestations).

articles.title: Management and long-term serum urate control in gout: a population-based primary care cohort study
articles.authors: Pou MA, Reyes C, Martinez-Laguna D, Satorra P, Tebe C, Dalbeth N, Diaz-Torne C

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Gout is a prevalent chronic inflammatory disease associated with a substantial clinical and cardiovascular burden. Despite the availability of effective urate-lowering therapies (ULTs), gout management remains suboptimal.

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To describe clinical characteristics and treatment patterns, and to identify factors associated with long-term serum urate (SU) control in gout.

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Retrospective population-based cohort study using the primary care research database 'Sistema d'Informació per al Desenvolupament de la Investigació en Atenció Primària' (SIDIAP), covering >75% of the Catalan population within a universal healthcare system.

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Individuals with incident gout diagnosed between 2012 and 2023 were included. Demographic, clinical, and ULT data were collected. Good SU control was defined as SU levels <6 mg/dL for ≥80% of follow-up time. Factors associated with SU control were analysed.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 94 759 patients were included (mean age 66.25 [standard deviation 14.64] years; 79.58% male [75 412/94 759]; median follow-up 5.44 [interquartile range 2.54-8.24] years). In the 94 759 patients, hypertension (65.15%, n = 61 732), dyslipidaemia (50.58%, n = 47 932), diabetes (24.19%, n = 22 919), and chronic kidney disease (32.80%, 27 013/82 270 ) were common. Of the patients, 88.95% (n = 84 288) had ≥1 SU measurement. In total, 37.30% (35 343/94 759) had never received ULT. Allopurinol was the initial therapy in 96.09% of treated patients. Only 12.40% (10 453/84 288) achieved good SU control, with no improvement over time. Short ULT duration (≤25 days) occurred in 15.92% (9459/59 416) of patients. Good control was associated with longer treatment duration, higher allopurinol doses, febuxostat use, and better adherence, whereas delayed ULT initiation, male sex, obesity, chronic kidney disease, dyslipidaemia, and hypertension were associated with poor control.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Long-term SU control in gout remains poor in primary care. Early initiation of ULT, appropriate dose optimisation, and improved adherence represent key modifiable targets to improve gout management.

articles.title: Impact of treatment duration on the effectiveness of opioid analgesia: a systematic review and meta-analysis
articles.authors: Froentjes LS, Barrington CA, Craig RA, Morcos M, Wedman DM, Korowynk CS, Kelmer MD, Campbell FN, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Opioid use can heighten pain perception over time.

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To determine whether the effectiveness of opioid analgesia diminishes with treatment duration in those with chronic low back pain or osteoarthritis.

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Systematic review of randomised trials comparing opioids with placebo/opioid-minimised pain management strategies in those with chronic low back pain or osteoarthritis.

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: A random-effects meta-analysis using MEDLINE, Embase, CENTRAL, and Scopus databases was undertaken in January 2025. The primary outcome was attainment of clinically important pain relief ('moderate' or ≥30% improvement). The secondary outcome was on-treatment pain (100-point scale). The primary analysis was difference in primary/secondary outcomes across short-term (≤4 weeks), intermediate-term (4-12 weeks), and long-term (≥12 weeks) duration subgroups.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: In total, 27 trials were eligible for inclusion. Clinically important pain relief differed significantly between short-, intermediate-, and long-term treatment durations (P = 0.05). Opioid recipients were more likely to be responders in short-term trials (eight trials, risk ratio [RR] 1.42, 95% confidence interval [CI] = 1.08 to 1.89, moderate-certainty evidence), but not in intermediate-term trials (three trials, RR 1.04, 95% CI = 0.84 to 1.30, low-certainty evidence), or long-term trials (nine trials, RR 0.91, 95% CI = 0.73 to 1.14, moderate-certainty evidence), which trended in favour of controls. The mean difference in pain scores failed to reach this review's definition of clinical significance (≥10 points) for any timepoint, but was statistically significant in the short and intermediate term.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Although opioids likely provide meaningful pain relief over short durations (≤4 weeks), they appear to provide little or no benefit beyond placebo over longer periods, and may worsen pain control beyond 12 weeks.

articles.title: Point-of-care biomarkers or laboratory-based tests to reduce antibiotic prescribing for COPD exacerbations: a literature review and meta-analysis in primary care
articles.authors: Frénois M, Fovet R, Wyts D, Collins C, Calafiore M, Berkhout C

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Acute exacerbations of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (AECOPD) are frequently treated with antibiotics in primary care, leading to antibiotic resistance and adverse effects. Assessing biomarkers might assist in reducing unnecessary antibiotic prescribing when used alongside clinical assessment.

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To evaluate the benefit of reviewing biomarkers in point-of-care testing (POCT) within practices and through laboratory blood tests in efforts to decrease antibiotic prescribing for AECOPD.

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Systematic review of randomised controlled trials (RCTs) and non-randomised studies conducted in primary care from January 2022 to November 2025 assessing POCTs for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: The primary outcome was the rate of antibiotic prescribing or use, and secondary outcomes were biomarker thresholds for prescribing antibiotics and patient harm. Searches were conducted in four medical databases, six registers, and COPD academic societies. Data were extracted and assessed for quality and bias. A meta-analysis was performed whenever possible.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of seven studies were included: one RCT and four non-randomised studies for C-reactive protein (CRP) POCT; and two RCTs on procalcitonin (PCT) in laboratories. The meta-analysis of CRP POCT indicated a statistically significant reduction in antibiotic prescribing (odds ratio 0.41, 95% confidence interval = 0.32 to 0.53; I² = 36%; low certainty of evidence). No meta-analysis for PCT was feasible.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: CRP POCT reduced antibiotic prescribing for AECOPD in primary care settings when used alongside clinical assessment. There were insufficient data to draw conclusions about the PCT biomarker.

articles.title: Exploring the implementation and integration of structured medication reviews in primary care: a qualitative evaluation using normalisation process theory
articles.authors: Reidy C, Seeley A, Tucker K, Agwunobi A, Bateman PA, Clark CE, Clegg AP, Ford GA, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Structured medication reviews (SMRs) were introduced into primary care in England in 2020 for patients living with multiple long-term conditions (MLTC), polypharmacy, increased frailty, in care homes, or at risk of medicines-related harm. SMRs aim to optimise the therapeutic potential of medication and reduce medicine-related harms through holistic reviews.

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To explore the day-to-day work being undertaken with, and by, clinical pharmacists to implement, embed, and integrate SMRs into practice, and consider how to optimise SMRs.

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Qualitative one-to-one interviews with clinical pharmacists undertaking SMRs and SMR service leaders/managers (SMR leads) in England between February 2023 and November 2024.

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Participants were recruited as part of a wider evaluation of the roll-out of SMRs in England. Interview topic guides and qualitative data analysis were informed by normalisation process theory.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Eighteen clinical pharmacists and five SMR leads participated. Participants reported often having to explain the purpose of SMRs and clinical pharmacists' roles to patients, partly owing to patients not being informed about SMRs. Participants valued SMRs and expressed that trust-building and tailored consultations were important for optimising medications. Integration of SMRs into routine practice varied because of high workload, inconsistent leadership support, inadequate administrative/pharmacist technician resource, and lack of training. However, participants described SMRs as valuable for identifying and addressing unmet needs and supporting holistic, person-centred care across MLTC pathways.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The findings demonstrate the need for improved information on SMRs for patients and primary care teams, adequate and appropriate resource allocation, and enhanced support for consultation skills training to optimise medicines use.

articles.title: Rivaroxaban Then Aspirin vs. Aspirin Alone after Total Hip or Knee Arthroplasty
articles.authors: Shivakumar S, Matino D, Zukor D, Kahn SR, Vincent G, Mundi R, Vendittoli PA, Refaei M, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Aspirin after an initial short course of rivaroxaban has been shown to be safe and effective for the prevention of venous thromboembolism after total hip or total knee arthroplasty, but uncertainty remains about the use of aspirin alone.
abstract.textZh: 初步短期服用利伐沙班後的阿司匹林已被證明對預防全臀或全膝關節置換術後的靜脈血栓栓塞是安全有效的，但單獨使用阿司匹林仍存在不確定性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this multicenter, double-blind, randomized, controlled trial, we assigned patients to receive once-daily thromboprophylaxis with either 81 mg of aspirin or 10 mg of oral rivaroxaban for the first 5 days after total hip or total knee arthroplasty. All the patients then received further thromboprophylaxis with 81 mg of aspirin daily for 9 additional days after knee arthroplasty and for 30 additional days after hip arthroplasty. Patients were followed for 90 days for symptomatic venous thromboembolism, which consisted of either proximal deep-vein thrombosis or pulmonary embolism (primary effectiveness outcome), and for bleeding complications (primary safety outcome). The noninferiority margin for aspirin alone as compared with rivaroxaban-aspirin was 0.7 percentage points.
abstract.textZh: 在這項多中心、雙盲、隨機、對照試驗中，我們將患者分配到全髖關節或全膝關節置換術後的前5天接受每日一次的血栓預防，使用81毫克阿司匹林或10毫克口服利伐沙班。然後，所有患者在膝關節置換術後每天使用81毫克阿司匹林進一步預防血栓形成，持續9天，並在髖關節置換術後持續30天。對症狀性靜脈血栓栓塞患者進行90天的追蹤，包括近端深靜脈血栓形成或肺栓塞（主要有效性結果） ，以及出血併發症（主要安全性結果）。與利伐沙班-阿司匹林相比，單獨使用阿司匹林的非劣效邊際為0.7個百分點。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 5429 patients underwent randomization. Venous thromboembolism developed in 13 of 2718 patients (0.48%) in the aspirin-alone group and in 12 of 2647 patients (0.45%) in the rivaroxaban-aspirin group (risk difference, 0.02 percentage points; 95% confidence interval [CI], -0.34 to 0.39; P<0.001 for noninferiority). Major bleeding or clinically relevant nonmajor bleeding events occurred in 45 of 2718 patients (1.66%) in the aspirin-alone group and in 54 of 2647 patients (2.04%) in the rivaroxaban-aspirin group (risk difference, -0.38%; 95% CI, -1.11 to 0.34).
abstract.textZh: 共有5429名患者接受了隨機分組。阿司匹林單獨組的2718名患者中有13名（ 0.48% ）發生靜脈血栓栓塞，利伐沙班-阿司匹林組的2647名患者中有12名（ 0.45% ）發生靜脈血栓栓塞（風險差異， 0.02個百分點； 95%可信區間[CI] ， -0.34至0.39 ；非劣效性P < 0.001 ）。單獨使用阿司匹林組的2718名患者中有45名（ 1.66% ）發生了嚴重出血或臨牀相關的非嚴重出血事件，而利伐沙班-阿司匹林組的2647名患者中有54名（ 2.04% ）發生了嚴重出血或臨牀相關的非嚴重出血事件（風險差異為-0.38% ； 95% CI為-1.11至0.34 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: After total hip and total knee arthroplasty, the use of aspirin alone was not inferior to a strategy of using rivaroxaban followed by aspirin for the prevention of symptomatic venous thromboembolism, with no clinically relevant difference in bleeding events. (Funded by the Canadian Institutes of Health Research; EPCAT III ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04075240.).
abstract.textZh: 全髖和全膝關節置換術後，單獨使用阿司匹林並不劣於使用利伐沙班隨後使用阿司匹林預防症狀性靜脈血栓栓塞的策略，出血事件沒有臨牀相關差異。（由加拿大衛生研究院資助； EPCAT III ClinicalTrials.gov編號： NCT04075240 ）。

articles.titleZh: 利伐沙班然後阿司匹林與全臀或膝關節置換術後單獨服用阿司匹林

articles.title: The Role of Telemedicine on Interhospital Transfer Outcomes : A Systematic Review
articles.authors: D'Arienzo D, Malecki SL, Wennberg E, Cunningham J, Fung A, Adair O, Mahant S, Guttmann A

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Interhospital transfers are essential to ensure access to appropriate levels of care, yet many transfers are potentially avoidable, leading to unnecessary resource use and patient burden.

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: To determine the association between telemedicine and interhospital transfer rates among patients considered for an interhospital transfer.

abstract.label: DATA SOURCES
abstract.text: Five databases were searched from database inception to 20 January 2026.

abstract.label: STUDY SELECTION
abstract.text: Studies including patients considered for transfer between hospitals, studies comparing telemedicine with usual care, and studies reporting interhospital transfers rates.

abstract.label: DATA EXTRACTION
abstract.text: Two independent reviewers extracted data and assessed risk of bias. The primary outcome was interhospital transfer rate; the secondary outcome was death. Grouping by patient population, clinical indication for transfer, setting, and intervention characteristic was done.

abstract.label: DATA SYNTHESIS
abstract.text: Thirty-three studies representing 609 188 patients were included. Given substantial clinical and methodological heterogeneity, a structured narrative synthesis was done. Telemedicine was commonly associated with lower transfer rates in adult (13 of 17 adult only studies) and pediatric (4 of 5 studies) populations, across clinical indication for transfer (medical [9 of 14 studies] versus surgical [6 of 7 studies] versus acute care conditions [7 of 12 studies]), and rural (9 of 16 studies) and urban (9 of 10 studies) settings. Variation in the transfer rate changes was driven by differences in confounder adjustment, comparator definitions, and study design. Telemedicine was associated with lower or unchanged mortality in most studies that assessed mortality (15 of 17 studies).

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Included studies were mostly observational with risk for confounding, with high heterogeneity driven by variability in study populations, telemedicine models, comparator groups, clinical contexts, and methodological approaches.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Telemedicine may support appropriate triage and reduce potentially avoidable interhospital transfers, with no adverse association on mortality, contributing to safe and efficient transfer decision making.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: None. (PROSPERO: CRD42023493486).

articles.title: Prolonged Short Sleep and Its Effect on Body Weight and Composition : A Pooled Analysis of Randomized Trials
articles.authors: Zuraikat FM, Scaccia SE, Cochran JA, Cheng B, Diaz KM, Creasy SA, Melanson EL, Shen W, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Insufficient sleep is associated with obesity. However, the causal effect on weight status of chronic, mildly insufficient sleep and its potential variability by gender and menopausal status remain unknown.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To explore the effect of 6 weeks of sleep restriction (SR) of 1.5 hours per night on energy balance and body weight regulation.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Pooled analysis of 2 randomized crossover trials. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT02960776 and NCT02835261).

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Outpatient intervention with inpatient and outpatient assessments.

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults (n = 95) aged 20 years or older at elevated cardiometabolic risk with habitual sleep of 7 or more hours per night.

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Six weeks of sustained adequate sleep (AS) and SR of 1.5 hours per night separated by a multiweek washout.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Outcome measures included adiposity (assessed using magnetic resonance imaging), body weight, waist circumference, and energy balance behaviors and biomarkers.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Sleep duration was reduced by 78.4 minutes (95% CI, -83.5 to -73.3 minutes) per night with SR versus AS. Body weight (0.45 kg [CI, 0.33 to 0.57 kg]), waist circumference (0.52 cm [CI, 0.25 to 0.79 cm]), and whole-body volume (0.56 L [CI, 0.19 to 0.93 L]) were increased with SR relative to AS. Leptin levels were elevated with SR versus AS (2.03 ng/mL [CI, 0.38 to 3.68 ng/mL]). Sedentary time was increased by 17.2 minutes (CI, 11.7 to 22.7 minutes) per day with SR versus AS.

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: The intervention duration may have been too short to identify changes in body composition, power to evaluate individual differences was limited, and effect sizes were modest.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Prolonged exposure to moderately short sleep may lead to weight gain, suggesting that weight management and cardiometabolic disease prevention programs should consider incorporating sleep strategies to promote AS.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institutes of Health and American Heart Association.

articles.title: Patient-Centered Prescription Opioid Tapering Methods : A Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Darnall BD, Perez L, Kao MC, Lorig K, Mardian AS, Flood P, Pun T, Hanson ER, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Evidence is needed on tapering long-term prescription opioids in outpatient settings.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To determine and compare the effectiveness of 3 opioid tapering and pain control strategies (July 2018 to November 2023).

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Randomized controlled trial. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT03445988).

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: 11 U.S. sites.

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults with pain for at least 6 months receiving a morphine equivalent daily dose (MEDD) of 10 or higher for at least 3 months without moderate or severe opioid use disorder.

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Patient-centered opioid tapering with close monitoring and electronic supports was administered as taper only, taper plus cognitive behavioral therapy for chronic pain (pain-CBT), or taper plus a chronic pain self-management program (CPSMP).

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Taper success (primary outcome) was either an MEDD decrease of at least 50% with no increased pain or no MEDD increase with decreased pain intensity.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 562 participants were randomly assigned (191 taper only, 203 taper plus pain-CBT, 168 taper plus CPSMP). The taper success rate was 50.9% (95% CI, 42.9% to 58.9%) for taper only, 48.6% (CI, 41.0% to 56.2%) for taper plus pain-CBT, and 44.5% (CI, 36.0% to 53.3%) for taper plus CPSMP. Tapering with pain-CBT or CPSMP provided no benefit in taper success over taper only (taper plus pain-CBT vs. taper only, -2.4 percentage points [CI, -11.9 to 7.2 percentage points]; taper plus CPSMP vs. taper only, -5.2 percentage points [CI, -15.3 to 4.8 percentage points]). Study-related adverse event risk (including opioid withdrawal symptoms) was highest in the taper only group (126 of 191 [66%]) compared with taper plus pain-CBT (109 of 203 [54%]) and taper plus CPSMP (108 of 168 [64%]).

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Challenges related to COVID-19 reduced the sample size and made treatment groups imbalanced; low behavioral treatment attendance and losses to follow-up could have limited effectiveness.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Adding CBT or self-management to patient-centered opioid tapering did not improve taper success at 12 months, although CBT may reduce adverse effects (including opioid withdrawal symptoms).

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute.

articles.title: The Comparative Effectiveness of Carvedilol Versus Other Nonselective β-Blockers in Cirrhosis
articles.authors: Simon TG, Zhang Y, Kehoe A, Chung RT, Lin KJ

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: In cirrhosis, nonselective β-blockers (NSBBs; carvedilol, nadolol, and propranolol) reduce hepatic portal pressure and have demonstrated benefit versus placebo for preventing decompensation. Although carvedilol has emerged as the preferred NSBB, direct evidence remains limited about its effectiveness for preventing decompensation and death versus other NSBBs.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To compare the effectiveness of carvedilol versus nadolol versus propranolol in cirrhosis.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Database cohort study.

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: A U.S. administrative claims database, Optum Clinformatics Data Mart (2013 to 2025).

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults with cirrhosis initiating carvedilol, nadolol, or propranolol.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: The primary outcome was a composite of hospitalization for major decompensation (ascites, spontaneous bacterial peritonitis [SBP], hepatorenal syndrome [HRS], hepatic encephalopathy, or variceal hemorrhage). Absolute risk differences (RDs) and risk ratios (RRs) at 6 months of follow-up were estimated using inverse probability of treatment weighting accounting for 129 preexposure covariates.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Carvedilol initiators had meaningfully lower 6-month risk for major decompensation events compared with nadolol (RD, -3.69 percentage points [95% CI, -5.33 to -2.09 percentage points]; RR, 0.80 [CI, 0.72 to 0.88]) or propranolol (RD, -2.88 percentage points [CI, -4.29 to -1.49 percentage points]; RR, 0.83 [CI, 0.76 to 0.90]). This included substantially lower 6-month risk for specific decompensation events with carvedilol compared with nadolol or propranolol, including reduced risk for variceal hemorrhage (RDs, -3.51 percentage points [CI, -4.79 to -2.20 percentage points] and -1.65 percentage points [CI, -2.71 to -0.59 percentage points], respectively) and ascites, SBP, or HRS (RDs, -3.05 percentage points [CI, -4.52 to -1.75 percentage points] and -1.58 percentage points [CI, -2.77 to -0.44 percentage points], respectively).

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Nonrandomized treatment selection.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Among U.S. patients with cirrhosis, carvedilol initiation-as opposed to nadolol or propranolol-was associated with meaningfully lower rates of major decompensation events.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institutes of Health.
abstract.textZh: 國立衛生研究院。

articles.title: Evaluating Additional Roles in Primary Care: Expanding Capacity and Transforming Care Delivery
articles.authors: Hong J, Penfold C, Edwards PJ, Kashyap MN, Mcleod H, Salisbury C, Walsh N, Bennett B, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: The Additional Roles Reimbursement Scheme (ARRS), introduced by NHS England in 2019, aimed to expand the workforce, promote multidisciplinary team-based care, and improve patient outcomes.

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To examine changes in consultation rates and outcomes in relation to ARRS implementation, and compare outcomes across primary care roles.

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Longitudinal cohort study using the Clinical Practice Research Datalink (CPRD) AURUM, analysing 12,170,079 consultations (2015-21) from 600,000 randomly sampled patients at 400 English practices.

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: Joinpoint regression modelled trends in age- and sex-standardised consultation rates, further consultations within 1-14 days, prescribing, and referrals. Multilevel regression compared outcomes between diagnostic-capable roles and general practitioners (GPs).

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Most consultations remained GP- or nurse-led, but rates with direct patient care (DPC)-ARRS-eligible roles increased, particularly for pharmacists, physiotherapists, and nursing associates. For paramedics and mental health practitioners, growth preceded formal ARRS inclusion, suggesting the scheme accelerated rather than initiated expansion. Most DPC-ARRS-eligible roles were consulted more frequently in less deprived areas, except physiotherapists. Compared to GPs, most DPC-ARRS-eligible roles delivered more consultations face-to-face (except pharmacists), had lower prescribing (except advanced nurse practitioners) and referral rates, and higher further consultation rates with a diagnostic-capable clinician within 1-14 days. However, all DPC-ARRS-eligible roles had lower odds of a further consultation specifically with a GP.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: ARRS has supported and accelerated the diversification of the primary care skill-mix. Patterns of consultation activity suggest an expansion of overall primary care capacity with some redistribution of workload across the multidisciplinary team, rather than a direct reduction in GP workload.

articles.title: Impact of local enhanced incentive schemes on the performance of general practices within the United Kingdom: a systematic review
articles.authors: Conroy M, McManus E, Whittaker W, Bower P, Anderson M

abstract.text: Background To drive improvements in health care quality and to reduce inequalities, pay-for-performance (P4P) schemes have become widespread internationally. In recent years, most local commissioning bodies in the United Kingdom (UK) have developed their own local general practice incentive schemes. Aim To examine the use and effectiveness of local incentive schemes and their alignment to the national Quality and Outcomes Framework (QOF). Design and Setting This was a systematic review of qualitative studies related to local incentive schemes with a P4P structure within UK general practice in the UK after 2004. Methods Searches were conducted via OVID across the Embase and MEDLINE databases. Risk of bias was assessed using the EPOC criteria and a narrative synthesis was undertaken. Results 17 studies were identified focused on 14 local incentive schemes. All studies were from England, except one from Scotland. 5 studies included only tailored indicators, and 7 studies included both aligned and tailored indicators. Quality assessment suggested the current evidence was of mixed quality. All studies demonstrated positive impacts on process measures but health outcome measures were only evaluated in 9 studies showing inconsistent findings. 8 studies addressed impact on health inequalities and no studies addressed cost-effectiveness, patient reported outcomes or experience measures. Conclusion There is an emerging evidence base that local incentive schemes in general practice lead to improvements in process measures, although methodological quality of studies is mixed. Future studies should utilise more robust methods to evaluate effectiveness and examine impacts on health inequalities, cost-effectiveness and variation by practice.

articles.title: Learning disability register enrolment in young people in England: Cohort Study, 2015-2023
articles.authors: Shah R, Horridge K, Saxena S, Hargreaves DS, Petersen I

abstract.text: Background Learning disability registers in UK primary care support proactive care, but under-identification remains substantial. The 2019 NHS Long Term Plan introduced targets to increase enrolment. Aim To estimate prevalence and rates of new registration to learning disability registers among young people aged 14-24 years in England and examine changes following the introduction of national targets. Design and setting Population-based open cohort study using routinely collected primary care data from general practices in England contributing to the Clinical Practice Research Datalink (CPRD) Aurum database, 2015-2023. Method Young people aged 14-24 years who had been registered at least 6 months were included. Annual rates of new registration per 10,000 person-years at risk (PYAR) and recorded prevalence were calculated, stratified by age, sex, region, and year. Results Between 2015 and 2023, 11,776 young people were first recorded on a learning disability register. Rates of new registration increased in 2020-2021 across ages and sexes, peaking at 15.8 per 10,000 PYAR in males aged 14-17 years and 8.4 per 10,000 in females before returning to pre-2019 levels by 2023. Recorded prevalence remained low overall (0.03%-0.5%; 3.6-52.7 per 10,000) but increased among those aged 18-24 years, with eight-to-ten-fold rises between 2015 and 2023. Prevalence was higher in males (rate ratios 1.7-1.8, 95% confidence interval 1.6-1.9). Conclusion National targets coincided with a temporary rise in enrolment, but identification remains below expected prevalence. Sustained policy focus and systematic identification and coding by practices are needed to ensure equitable access to preventive care during the transition to adulthood.
abstract.textZh: 背景 英國初級保健中登記的學習障礙支持主動護理，但識別不足的情況仍然嚴重。 2019 年 NHS 長期計劃引入了增加入學率的目標。目的 估計英格蘭 14-24 歲年輕人新登記學習障礙登記的盛行率和比率，並檢視引入國家目標後的變化。設計和設置基於人群的開放隊列研究，使用從英格蘭一般實踐中定期收集的初級保健數據，這些數據有助於臨床實踐研究數據鏈（CPRD）Aurum數據庫，2015-2023年。方法 納入登記時間不少於6個月的14-24歲青少年。按年齡、性別、地區和年份分層，計算每 10,000 人年風險 (PYAR) 的年新登記率和記錄的盛行率。結果 2015 年至 2023 年間，有 11,776 名年輕人首次被記錄在學習障礙登記冊上。 2020 年至 2021 年，不同年齡和性別的新登記率有所增加，14-17 歲男性的峰值為每 10,000 人每年 15.8 人，女性為每 10,000 人 8.4 人，然後到 2023 年恢復到 2019 年之前的水平。整體記錄的盛行率仍然較低（0.03%-0.5%；每 10,000 歲女性 3.6-52.7 人）。 10,000），但在 18-24 歲人群中有所增加，2015 年至 2023 年間增加了 8 至 10 倍。男性的盛行率較高（比率為 1.7-1.8，95% 信賴區間為 1.6-1.9）。結論 國家目標與入學率暫時上升相吻合，但識別率仍低於預期盛行率。需要持續的政策重點以及實踐的系統識別和編碼，以確保在向成年過渡期間公平獲得預防性護理。

articles.titleZh: 英格蘭年輕人學習障礙登錄註冊：隊列研究，2015-2023 年

articles.title: Disparities in the uptake of learning disability (intellectual disability) annual health checks
articles.authors: Sutherland D, Costello B, Chauhan U, Flynn S, Gray KM, Parsons J, Spencer R, Crawford H

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: People with intellectual disabilities (referred to as learning disabilities in the United Kingdom) face considerable health inequalities. One attempt to address these in England has been through incentivising General Practices to complete annual health checks with people with a learning disability aged 14 or over.
abstract.textZh: 智障者（在英國稱為學習障礙）面臨相當大的健康不平等。在英格蘭，解決這些問題的一項嘗試是透過激勵全科醫生對 14 歲或以上有學習障礙的人完成年度健康檢查。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: We aimed to examine recent trends in learning disability registers and the uptake of learning disability annual health checks in England.
abstract.textZh: 我們的目的是研究英格蘭學習障礙登記冊和學習障礙年度健康檢查的最新趨勢。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Secondary analysis of publicly available data.
abstract.textZh: 對公開資料的二次分析。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We compiled and analysed NHS England data on the learning disabilities annual health check scheme from January 2022 to November 2025.
abstract.textZh: 我們整理並分析了 2022 年 1 月至 2025 年 11 月英國 NHS 有關學習障礙年度健康檢查計劃的數據。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The number of 14-17year-olds and adults on learning disability registers increased during this period by 30.49% and 14.53%, respectively. The most recent estimates indicate that around 0.588% of patients are on learning disability registers and 0.526% are also aged ≥14-years-old and eligible for annual health checks. The uptake of annual health checks increased slightly from 68.08% to 71.58% among 14-17-year-olds, and from 79.07% to 80.71% among adults. Uptake is lowest in the South-West and East of England, and highest in London, but is similar across deciles of patient deprivation and practice size.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Ascertainment of people with a learning disability by primary care services appears to be improving but remains between a third and a quarter of prevalence estimates. The uptake of annual health checks among 14-17-year-olds continues to lag behind that of adults.

articles.title: Recording of Pharmacy First consultations in general practice records in England: an observational study of the service's first year using OpenSAFELY
articles.authors: Kingsley VJ, Wiedemann M, Wood C, Curtis HJ, Green A, Fisher L, Andrews CD, Evans D, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Pharmacy First, a national community pharmacy service, launched in January 2024 to improve access to primary care for patients with minor conditions facing backlogs caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. Pharmacies are required to share details about their consultations with general practices.
abstract.textZh: Pharmacy First 是一項全國社區藥局服務，於 2024 年 1 月啟動，旨在改善因 COVID-19 大流行而面臨積壓的輕症患者獲得初級保健的機會。藥局必須分享其與全科診所諮詢的詳細資訊。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To describe how and what clinical activity was recorded in general practice during the first year of the Pharmacy First service.
abstract.textZh: 描述在 Pharmacy First 服務的第一年期間，在一般實踐中記錄的臨床活動的方式和內容。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: With the approval of NHS England, we conducted a retrospective cohort study between 31 January 2024 and 30 January 2025 using OpenSAFELY-TPP, a secure platform for analysing pseudonymised GP records from practices using TPP software.
abstract.textZh: 經英國 NHS 批准，我們在 2024 年 1 月 31 日至 2025 年 1 月 30 日期間使用 OpenSAFELY-TPP 進行了一項回顧性隊列研究，OpenSAFELY-TPP 是一個安全平台，用於分析使用 TPP 軟體的診所的假名全科醫生記錄。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We described patient demographics, Pharmacy First consultation trends, and the clinical conditions and medications coded with the consultations.
abstract.textZh: 我們描述了患者人口統計、Pharmacy First 諮詢趨勢以及諮詢中編碼的臨床狀況和藥物。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 402,165 Pharmacy First consultations were recorded for 340,710 patients from a general population of 26,142,380 registered patients in OpenSAFELY-TPP. Acute pharyngitis (28.9%) and uncomplicated urinary tract infection (28%) were the most frequently recorded conditions. By January 2025, 36.3% of recorded Pharmacy First consultations had a clinical condition, medication, or both. Females, younger adults and those living in more deprived areas were observed more often in Pharmacy First records compared to the general population.
abstract.textZh: 在 OpenSAFELY-TPP 的 26,142,380 名註冊患者中，共記錄了 340,710 名患者的 402,165 次藥房首次諮詢。急性咽炎（28.9%）和單純性泌尿道感染（28%）是最常見的情況。到 2025 年 1 月，記錄的 Pharmacy First 諮詢中有 36.3% 涉及臨床狀況、藥物或兩者兼而有之。與一般人群相比，女性、年輕人和生活在較貧困地區的人在 Pharmacy First 記錄中出現的頻率更高。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Increasing recording of the Pharmacy First community pharmacy service was observed in general practice records during its first year, particularly among younger and more deprived populations. However, variation in structured recording of consultation details may limit evaluation.
abstract.textZh: 在第一年的全科醫療記錄中觀察到「藥局第一」社區藥局服務的記錄不斷增加，特別是在年輕和貧困人群中。然而，諮詢細節的結構化記錄的變化可能會限制評估。
